faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College to M.Com students?
faqs.answer: Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 4.08 - INR 5.5 LPA to M.Com students.

faqs.question: Is GGDSD College Chandigarh good for BCA?
faqs.answer: Yes, SD College Chandigarh is good for BCA because, according to India Today MDRA's best college survey 2021, the college stands at 1st rank in the BCA programme, and at all India levels they are placed in the 19th position for BCA. If you are interested in SD College for BCA, it will be the best decision. You must have atleast 50% in Class 12 after that college offers direct admission.

faqs.question: Is Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College a good college?
faqs.answer: Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College is one of the best institutions for any commerce and Science student. It is located in Chandigarh with an excellent faculty strength, as about 70% of all faculty are PhD holders. The placement record of the college is average, nearly around 50-60% in top MNCs, with an average salary ranging between INR 2.5 Lacs to INR 4 Lacs per year for BSc and BCom programs. Thus, its a very good college in all terms according to my research.

college_info.intro: GGDSD offers 40+ courses at UG, PG & Doctorate level. A range of Diploma & Vocational courses are also offered by the college. BA, BCOM, BCA, BBA & BSc are the popular courses. They are offered at the UG level. The duration of these courses ranges between 3-4 years. BA programme is offered in the subjects like English, History, Economics, etc. The admissions to these programmes are based on merit. Students need to check the eligibility of the interested courses from the official college page. Several internship & placement opportunities are given to the students. After completing the programmes, students can work in both private & government sectors or can opt for higher studies like Master's in interested course. Several PG level programmes like MCom, MCA, etc are also offered to the students. Below follows the most popular programmes of GGDSD:

placements.overview: The Placement Cell at GGDSD College is highly active & preparing students for the professional world by connecting them with top companies and industries.The cell also promotes industry interaction by organising guest lectures and expert sessions, helping students stay aligned with current market trends and employer expectations. Top companies like Google, Dell, Wipro, Ranbaxy, etc come to college for hiring the students.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students

faqs.answer: A:    Goswami Ganesh Dutt Sanatan Dharama College has been ranked 12th rank in BCA,  23rd rank in Commerce,  23rd rank in Science,  18th rank in BBA, and 41st rank in Arts at All India level in a survey conducted by 'India Today' in collaboration with Nielsen India survey in 2020.The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 7 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College?

faqs.answer: A:    Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College is a well-known institute in Chandigarh for offering placements to its students. The institute has achieved 90% placements in the academic year 2024-25. The highest and average package secured by batch 2025 was INR 8.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA. More than 20 recruiters participated and placed 200 students in prominent companies.
faqs.question: What is the reality of Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College placement?

faqs.answer: A:    Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College has an active placement cell that offers a comprehensive platform for career support through regular training, workshops, and seminars focused on resume building, interview skills, aptitude, and group discussions. The cell also promotes industry interaction by organising guest lectures and expert sessions, helping students stay aligned with current market trends and employer expectations.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at GGDSD College?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall GGDSD average package offered during the 2025 placement drive stood at INR 6 LPA. Earlier, the GGDSD average package offered in 2024 was INR 6.07 LPA

fees_and_eligibility.overview: GGDSD offers 40+ courses at UG, PG & Doctorate level. A range of Diploma & Vocational courses are also offered by the college. UG courses like BA, BCOM, BCA, BBA , BSc, etc are offered at the UG level. The duration of these courses ranges between 3-4 years. At PG level courses like MCom, MSc, etc are offered. PG courses are offered for the duration of 2 years. Several Diploma courses like PGDCA (Computer Applications), PGDMC (Mass Communication), etc are also offered to the students. Students need to check the eligibility of the interested courses from the official college page. The fee for different courses are different based on duration & level of the course.

faqs.answer: A:    SD College, Goswami Ganesh Dutta is one of the moderately competitive colleges. It has a fair cut-off percentage for admission to various courses, including that of BSc. For the students seeking admission to the BSc course, the cut-off percentage ranges from 85% to 95%, and the total intake of students is around 300. The minimum required score for aggregate in class 12 is 75% so the practical cut-off varies with programme and category.
faqs.question: Is Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College offers Degree and Diploma courses including 21 UG and 13 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Seats intake availability for these courses at Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College goes up to 2900.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Please don't consider this.

review_content.Placements: If you’re coming to this college, then please don’t expect placement. Its the least possible thing college is concerned about. Almost every student here is either for Masters or has a family business, here for just a degree. Barely any student gets placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are just natural saunas. Just walk 5 minutes you’ll complete the campus tour. The labs and library are decent. Sports facilities are barely accessible. Never saw a medical facility here, so don’t know. Hostels are really small but decent. Don’t get food from that canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has excellent campus infrastructure, but poor placements.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario for our batch has been quite underwhelming. Regarding internships, the college assistance is minimal and most students have to find internships on their own without much guidance from the placement cell. The packages offered are generally on the lowest side.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is undoubtedly the strongest aspect of the college. There is a well stocked library with Wi-Fi. The reading room is great for self-study. The canteen food is quite decent but not so good. Students also get medical and sports facilities to use.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: First Semester: Promising start; Room for growth.

review_content.Placements: I have seen in the brochure and also heard from many people that many students got good placements even during their course. Many companies like Deloitte visit our college. 60% of the students got internships in good companies. The highest salary package is 25 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am not sure about the hostels as I am not a hosteler, but I heard from students that the rooms and the washrooms are maintained very well. The labs are equipped with the latest software and technology. The classrooms have the material that is required by the teachers to teach.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty. The college is good at annual placements and has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: For the B.Com 2024 batch, the placement rate was 50–85%. A total of 121 students get placed. The highest package was 7.5 LPA, the average package was around 6.23 LPA, and the lowest package was around 3.82 LPA. Top recruiters are Deloitte, ICICI Bank, and HDFC Bank. Top roles offered were Analyst and Deputy Manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good compared to other colleges under Panjab University. There is a Wi-Fi in some parts of the college. There is a proper library for study. Labs are well maintained. The college also has a good record in games, and it has won many medals in shooting.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Feb 2026) - B.A. (English, Economics, Sociology) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: S.D. College life in Chandigarh, good faculty and superb crowd.

review_content.Placements: No placements were given to us, specially to students from Bachelors fields. There were no internships, sadly, and there were no industrial visits. It doesn't make us industry ready. I think commerce students got some placement opportunities, but I'm not really sure.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really pleasing, however, in rainy season, a lot of water stores up in the garden area. Our block benches were a bit old, but most classes were held in commerce block! Wi-Fi was given in library. The canteen food was nice, however, limited options were there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Feb 2026) - B.A. (English, Economics, Sociology) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Goswami Ganesh Dutt Sanatan Dharma College is a good college.

review_content.Placements: The college has its own placement cell, and MNCs visit the campus, like Delliote, which is a regular visitor for internships and jobs. For an undergraduate course, the average package ranges from 6 LPA to 10 LPA, depending on your skills and knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is no doubt small in terms of area and non-AC classes, but it has a furnished library and has Wi-Fi on campus. The college has 3 canteens, there exists a sports department, but no proper sports grounds on the campus. The hostel is worth the money, with all facilities and the best part of the college.

faqs.answer: For admission to the Mscprogram at Goswami Ganesh Dutta Sanatan Dharma (GGDSD) College, entrance exam scores are generally not required. Admissions are typically based onmerit, meaning your performance in your undergraduate degree will be the primary criterion.

faqs.question: Is Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College hard to get?
faqs.answer: SD College, Goswami Ganesh Dutta is one of the moderately competitive colleges. It has a fair cut-off percentage for admission to various courses, including that of BSc. For the students seeking admission to the BSc course, the cut-off percentage ranges from 85% to 95%, and the total intake of students is around 300. The minimum required score for aggregate in class 12 is 75% so the practical cut-off varies with programme and category.

faqs.question: Is the Goswami Ganesh Dutta SD College cutoff released?

faqs.question: How can I get admission to SD College Chandigarh for a BBA?
faqs.answer: SD College Chandigarh offers 120 seats in BBA programme and they also have an additional 40 seats for which they get approval from Panjab University. Applicants who are interested in BBA can apply for the admission form online. To gain admission to BBA, Students must have an aggregate of 50% in Class 12 from a recognised board. If the student has other exam mark sheets related to this field and has a 50% aggregate, can also be eligible for this course.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to BBA GGDSD College Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Yes, SD College offers direct admission to BBA subjects. Students must fulfil the eligibility criteria and apply on the official website of the college. After all the procedures the college releases its merit list. If the student is shortlisted on merit then they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA at GGDSD College?
faqs.answer: Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College offers a 3-year BBA course. The tuition fee for BBA at GGDSD College Chandigarh costs around INR 24,000. This fee is exclusive of other components such as application fee, examination fee, security deposit, etc. The fee is taken from the official website, but is still subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website before applying to GGDSD College.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College?
faqs.answer: Goswami Ganesh Dutta S.D. College offers admission solely on the basis of merit. The eligibility criteria varies for each course. However, the admission to all courses is based on the merit acquired in the qualifying exam as well as scores obtained in the course-level entrance exam for some courses. Candidates who wish to apply to GGDSD College, must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required to get admission in GGDSD College, Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: There are different percentage criteria for different programmes provided by the SD College Chandigarh. This college provides over 15 programmes which include UG, PG, certificate and doctoral programme. Here’s a table explaining the percentage criteria of different programmes at SD College Chandigarh:CourseEligibilityBSc (General)- 40% in Class 12 from a recognised board- Must have passed at least two Science subjects-For CS specialisation:Must have completed Class 12 with subjects Science, Commerce, Economics, Mathematics and IT in Class 12BBA-Students scored at least 50% aggregate in Class 12-If any student passed other exam related to the field with 50% aggregate they will also opted the courseBCA-Students scored at least 50% aggregate in Class 12-If any student passed other exam related to the field with 50% aggregate, they will also have opted the course-10-20 % weightage is given to those students who done their Class 12 in Mathematics/Statistics, Computer Science and Information

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to SD College Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: No, there isno entrance examneeded to be admitted toSantana Dharma College Chandigarh (SD College). Admission is merit-based at this university. Students need to apply to the official website of the college and fill out the admission form. They must also meet the eligibility criteria and are required to a non-refundable registration fee. After the process is completed, the final seat allotment is merit based.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to SD College Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: SD College offersmerit-basedadmission. The students must fulfill the eligibility criteria to secure admission. For instance, UG applicants must have completed their Class 12 and PG applicants must have a UG degree. The college offers over15  undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate and doctoral programme. Other than the undergraduate and postgraduate courses, The college offers specialised courses andcertificate-based courseswhich include Event management, Tourism and Travel, Animation and Graphics and many more.

faqs.question: Is SD College of Chandigarh under CUET?
faqs.answer: No, the SD College of Chandigarh is not under CUET. The admission is based on the merit list for every Undergraduate, Postgraduate and Diploma programme the admission is based on the merit list. The college has some basic eligibility criteria that differ from course to course i.e., if a student wants to apply for an undergraduate course, they must have completed Class 12 with a good aggregate score. Additionally, if a student wants to apply for higher education they must have Class 12 and undergraduate marks certificate.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't consider this.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are just natural saunas. Just walk 5 minutes you’ll complete the campus tour. The labs and library are decent. Sports facilities are barely accessible. Never saw a medical facility here, so don’t know. Hostels are really small but decent. Don’t get food from that canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent campus infrastructure, but poor placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is undoubtedly the strongest aspect of the college. There is a well stocked library with Wi-Fi. The reading room is great for self-study. The canteen food is quite decent but not so good. Students also get medical and sports facilities to use.

reviews.review_heading: First Semester: Promising start; Room for growth.
reviews.review_text: I am not sure about the hostels as I am not a hosteler, but I heard from students that the rooms and the washrooms are maintained very well. The labs are equipped with the latest software and technology. The classrooms have the material that is required by the teachers to teach.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty. The college is good at annual placements and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good compared to other colleges under Panjab University. There is a Wi-Fi in some parts of the college. There is a proper library for study. Labs are well maintained. The college also has a good record in games, and it has won many medals in shooting.

reviews.review_heading: S.D. College life in Chandigarh, good faculty and superb crowd.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really pleasing, however, in rainy season, a lot of water stores up in the garden area. Our block benches were a bit old, but most classes were held in commerce block! Wi-Fi was given in library. The canteen food was nice, however, limited options were there.

reviews.review_heading: Goswami Ganesh Dutt Sanatan Dharma College is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college is no doubt small in terms of area and non-AC classes, but it has a furnished library and has Wi-Fi on campus. The college has 3 canteens, there exists a sports department, but no proper sports grounds on the campus. The hostel is worth the money, with all facilities and the best part of the college.

reviews.review_heading: The crowd of SD college is very good. There are lots of clubs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of SD College is very good. All the computer labs are AC centralized, and the whole campus is fully Wi-Fi accessible. The library is well-stocked with new books. Facilities in our hostel are excellent. The mess and canteen food are also good. Various sports and games are played in SD College.

reviews.review_heading: My college is one of the best colleges in Chandigarh. I like my college very much, also facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is old compared to other colleges. Facilities in the hostel are good, but the food is bad. Everything else is good. In medical emergencies, help arrives late every time. Many games are available in the hostel like basketball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: SD College is a good Co-ed college. You can think of taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of SD College is excellent. The IT building is fully AC centralized, and the library is also amazing. The food available in the mess and canteen is also good. In SD college, a lot of students are interested in sports, so those students who are interested in sports and want to make a career out of it can apply to SD college.

reviews.review_heading: GGDSD College has best faculty members and great clubs for students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college as well as hostel is the best. College itself has a huge infrastructure. There are two canteens at the college. Nescafe and backyard cafe are there. Lifts are there in college so overall its best. The crowd is also good. There are canteens to sit in during your free time. A ground is there.

reviews.review_heading: Good facility and campus.
reviews.review_text: Entire hostel and IT block are equipped with Wi-Fi, with air-conditioned classrooms featuring smart projectors, a two-floor library housing over 76,000 books, an event space such as an auditorium with more than 850 audience capacity, a clean and hygienic canteen, and a hostel with a capacity of 170 girls and 150 boys having well-furnished rooms, clean washrooms, a mess serving three meals with tea and snacks, frequent doctor visits, and a well-equipped games room with all sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because the faculty is very understanding, and there are good placements.
reviews.review_text: College campus is not big, but all the classrooms, labs, and library are in very good condition. The hostel facilities are good, and there is a canteen with a wide variety of food and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were really nice. It provided 24X7 electricity and water facilities. Other requirements were also available. Library and computer lab facility were provided inside the hostel. It maintained high standards in food and hygiene. The hostel rooms were big and spacious rooms were cleaned. Every day, students had to share the washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty members of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are many basic facilities like proper electricity and water supply. The infrastructure of the college is very good. One can easily find classrooms and labs. One can also get assistance in the library easily. The quality of food available in the canteen is hygienic. They use gloves and a cap while making the food. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college, the college is in the city, and different fests and events are conducted.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall college is good, fans are in all the rooms. Light is available, and all are in good working condition. The block of arts, science, and commerce are different and professional courses like BBA block is different. Our college has auditorium, canteen, sports ground, etc. Hostel is quite good. All facilities are provided in the hostel and fee of hostel is also affordable. Mess of the hostel and food is quite amazing.

After the process is completed, the final seat allotment is merit based.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Polytechnic, Mumbai.

review_content.Placements: 35% of students get placed in companies like Tata, TVS, Honda, Bajaj Auto, etc. 60 of students get placed in local MIDC industries in Butibori like CEAT, Indorama, etc. Bajaj Auto and Tata Motors are top recruiting companies for our course. Around 45% of students got internships at Tata, Bajaj, Maruti, and Honda in the mechanical engineering course. The role offered in our course is a trainee diploma engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students, and it is only for staff members. Labs are available for students for practical knowledge. Classrooms are available. The library is available and very good. The hostel is decent. There is no kitchen in the hostel. The quality of food is not good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games are not available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best options for diploma students, with experienced and helpful faculty.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for AI & ML students as this course does not follow the sandwich pattern. You need to find an internship on your own for the last year of the diploma. Other departments do get decent placements, ranging from 4 LPA to 8 LPA. All students get internships as practical knowledge is focused on more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided for our course is quite good and is still in development. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all well-maintained. There are no computers, yet you need to carry laptops for now, as it is a new branch/course. Boys' hostel is under construction, but there are hostels in nearby area. The canteen is decent, but you can avoid it if you are a day scholar.

review_summary.college_name: Government Polytechnic, Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, experience is good but it is not a regretful decision.

content.Placements: About 20% of students are placed. Most others have to find their internships on their own. The highest salary is Rs 15,000 per month but it is not referred to by the college or by any top recruitment company. Roles offered are full-stack developer, social media page handler, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good. Computers are not that good but they are working fine for coding, as for practical subject, the environment is clean and tidy. As for hostel, it is under construction so it will be made in 1 or 1.5 years so it will be available in 2 years.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am very thankful to this college as I have gained a lot of knowledge and experience from here.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed from this course. The highest salary is Rs. 20,000, the lowest is Rs. 7,000, and the average salary is Rs. 12,000 offered in our course. Top recruiting companies are not there. We got placed at the startup. Only 96 percent of students got internships from our course, and in different companies, the top roles offered are for software testers and web developers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure provided by our department are very good. They provided us with labs for practical performance, and Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms are available with good facilities. I didn't have any idea about the facilities of the hostel, but the college cafeteria is good, and the food is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Polytechnic, Mumbai.

content.Placements: 35% of students get placed in companies like Tata, TVS, Honda, Bajaj Auto, etc. 60 of students get placed in local MIDC industries in Butibori like CEAT, Indorama, etc. Bajaj Auto and Tata Motors are top recruiting companies for our course. Around 45% of students got internships at Tata, Bajaj, Maruti, and Honda in the mechanical engineering course. The role offered in our course is a trainee diploma engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students, and it is only for staff members. Labs are available for students for practical knowledge. Classrooms are available. The library is available and very good. The hostel is decent. There is no kitchen in the hostel. The quality of food is not good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games are not available here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best options for diploma students, with experienced and helpful faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placements for AI & ML students as this course does not follow the sandwich pattern. You need to find an internship on your own for the last year of the diploma. Other departments do get decent placements, ranging from 4 LPA to 8 LPA. All students get internships as practical knowledge is focused on more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided for our course is quite good and is still in development. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all well-maintained. There are no computers, yet you need to carry laptops for now, as it is a new branch/course. Boys' hostel is under construction, but there are hostels in nearby area. The canteen is decent, but you can avoid it if you are a day scholar.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Government Polytechnic Mumbai as an AIML student.

content.Placements: AIML is a new department in college so we don't have to do any kind of internships. We can do regular semesters with projects and other subjects. From next year AIML will also start having internships and placements. I guess they will have many opportunities since they can apply for so many positions like developer, ML engineer, data scientist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is decent. But our department's infrastructure is good since its new and has all the facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, good benches, and chairs. Since I am a day scholar so I don't know about the hostel. Canteen food is not bad and its definitely worth the money.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for students, and it is only for staff members. Labs are available for students for practical knowledge. Classrooms are available. The library is available and very good. The hostel is decent. There is no kitchen in the hostel. The quality of food is not good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games are not available here.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best options for diploma students, with experienced and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for our course is quite good and is still in development. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all well-maintained. There are no computers, yet you need to carry laptops for now, as it is a new branch/course. Boys' hostel is under construction, but there are hostels in nearby area. The canteen is decent, but you can avoid it if you are a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Government Polytechnic Mumbai as an AIML student.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is decent. But our department's infrastructure is good since its new and has all the facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, good benches, and chairs. Since I am a day scholar so I don't know about the hostel. Canteen food is not bad and its definitely worth the money.

reviews.review_heading: GPM college review perfect for diploma.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was pretty old-fashioned. Also, the hostels were very old but everything was fine as compared to the price at which they were offered. The quality of food was decent in both the hostel mess as well as the canteen. There were no classrooms and laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life that I feel surreal.
reviews.review_text: Information technology department has 4 computer labs and 4 classes. One library is available which is associated with the whole college. Wi-Fi facility is also available. Currently hostel is under construction means the facility has been available since the covid period. The inter-college level sports happen every year between different colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Story of Government Polytechnic, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good and developing further, and especially for the AIML branch, they provide Wi-Fi, a separate lab, AC, and I'm a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel, but yes, they provide those facilities. And the campus is a good place; placements offered by them are totally satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: My experience of GPM's IT Diploma (batch 2024) .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of classrooms and labs were good enough to study in. They had fast Wi-Fi and working computers. The sports facilities, canteen food, and fests were not too bad—average, I would say. I was not staying in the hostel, so I can't say anything about it.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty & placement, and very bad infrastructure, campus, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a girls' hostel; they have a boys' hostel, but it is under construction. All the courses are available in the college. Each branch has its own floor and labs, but the PCs and necessary equipment are not available in the quantity required for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College campus.
reviews.review_text: This college had a hostel before, but now there is no hostel in the college, so the students who are living far from a college need a hostel, so the college has some types of hostels like Churchgate, Bandra Borivali, and many more, and the college helps students to sleep.

reviews.review_heading: Life at government polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: The college had good infrastructure and a good campus. It was well-equipped with facilities like Wi-Fi and internet. The classrooms were very spacious and could easily host 30–45 students. The college also provided a library. Not a variety of books were provided but the ones that are essential were. I was a local so I didn't have to opt for a hostel or mess. But the food items served in the canteen were good to go. The college didn't have any ground- or turf-like facilities. But they had a numbe...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and education but not with placement, infrastructure, or campus life.
reviews.review_text: college needs to improve in infrastructure and all facilities and it's least expected as it is government college. There are no Wi-Fi or projectors in classrooms. There's one library for all the courses students. In practicals, computers are also limited. In the practical lab, 3 students have to do one practical on one computer. But the campus is good with all the nature around. hostel is so affordable for the students Hostel dress is 4.5k per month, which includes breakfast, lunch, high tea, di...

reviews.review_heading: An honest review from an honest student. Do not interfere in teachers politics.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, not a good building. The food is good, but not that good. There is no point in complaining about it because nothing will happen and they will ignore your complaint. It's better to be with it and control yourself. There is no good water service as well; they have only one filter.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college with well-equipped facilities and qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs equipped with a Wi-Fi and many computers. The classrooms are neat with digital boards and a good library. The food provided in the hostel is good and healthy. Every week, there is two meals including chicken and you get eggs twice in the mess.

college_info.college_name: AND Academy Reviews on Courses, Pricing, Features & Career Impact

highlights.summary:
AND Academy is an online design upskilling platform by the Indian Institute of Art and Design (IIAD), New Delhi, in collaboration with Kingston School of Art, London. With over a decade of expertise in design education, the Academy offers professional courses tailored for graduates and working professionals from various fields. Unlike traditional learning models, AND Academy delivers live, interactive sessions that balance convenience and accessibility, allowing students to work and learn simultaneously. The platform integrates expert mentorship, practical training, and industry insights to equip learners with the skills necessary for a successful career in design.

And Academy offers courses under various design categories, including Graphic Design, User Experience (UX) Design, User Interface (UI) Design, Interior Design, and Motion Graphics. The institute adopts interactive methods to offer practical exposure to the students and help them acquire technical skills, preparing them for better roles in the design industry.

Read More: And Academy Courses and Fees

table.details: Graphic Design, UX and UI Design, Interior Design, Motion Graphics

IBM, Gartner, EY, Cognizant, SONY, WNS, JLL, etc.

faqs.question: Is prior experience or knowledge in design required for admission to AND Academy?
How are the online courses at AND Academy structured?
What types of online courses does AND Academy offer?
Can a learner work full-time while enrolled in a course at AND Academy?

college_info.college_name: AND Academy Courses & Certifications Online

faqs.answer: No prerequisite experience is required in design is required for admission to AND Academy. The courses have been designed for those who may have very little experience to those who have some design background. Yet a basic knowledge of design or related domains could be helpful. These are foundational and advanced skills-building courses and are suitable for any beginner or a professional alike.
faqs.question: Q: Is prior experience or knowledge in design required for admission to AND Academy?

faqs.answer: While not all courses at the AND Academy come with a job guarantee, specific programs offer this assurance. Specifically, the PG Diploma in Graphic Design (36 weeks or 1 year) and the Diploma and PG Diploma in UX/UI Design (36 weeks or 1 year) include a job guarantee. This means learners who complete these programs are either placed in a relevant role or are eligible for a course fee refund, provided they meet all the requirements.
faqs.question: Q: Is there a job guarantee upon completion of a course at AND Academy?

faqs.answer: AND Academy’s online courses are structured to balance flexibility with comprehensive learning. The courses are typically divided into modules that progressively address key topics. Each module may include:Video lectures: Pre-recorded lessons that can be watched anytime, providing flexibility for students in different time zones or with varying schedules.Assignments: Practical assignments are a critical component of each course, requiring students to apply their knowledge. These tasks mimic real-world scenarios and industry challenges, helping students build a portfolio as they progress.Projects: These are larger, more comprehensive projects combining different course material aspects. Mentors or peers may review these projects and offer constructive feedback.Interactive elements: This includes quizzes, case studies, and live Q&A sessions with instructors or guest speakers from the industry.Peer reviews: Some courses may incorporate peer feedback as part of the learning process, where students critique each other’s work to foster collaborative learning.
faqs.question: Q: How are the online courses at AND Academy structured?

faqs.answer: AND Academy offers a wide range of online courses focused on the design industry. Their main categories include:Graphic Design: This course covers typography, layout, branding, and digital graphics and is designed to build strong foundational and advanced skills for aspiring graphic designers.UI/UX Design: This course focuses on user interface and user experience design, teaching students how to design effective, user-centered products and digital interfaces.Interior Design: Students learn the principles of space planning, color theory, furniture design, and sustainable practices, preparing them to design functional, aesthetic spaces.Animation & Motion Graphics: This course introduces 2D and 3D animation techniques, motion design, and visual storytelling, helping students build portfolios suited for film, advertising, and digital media.Visual Communication: A broader look into how visual elements communicate ideas, emotions, and narratives effectively, essential for roles in marketing, advertising, and content creation.
faqs.question: Q: What types of online courses does AND Academy offer?

highlights.summary: Bennett University admissions 2026 are open for all the courses. Candidates can apply online for their desired courses by visiting the official university's website. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Bennett University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech programme for the duration of four-years. The university offers BTech programme in CSE, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics & Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biotech, Artificial Intelligence, and others. Bennett University Noida BTech students can even go for non-technical jobs such as Marketing Managers, Customer Service Representatives, Sales Representatives, and Product Managers.
Noida Bennett University MBA course students can choose from various specialisations such as Human Resources, Marketing, Business Analytics, Media, Mogistics & Supply Chain, Healthcare, and others. MBA students are taught to create an entrepreneurial mindset. The students can develop analytical thinking and innovation, critical thinking and analysis, and various other skills. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Bennett University and their respective eligibility and Bennett University fees:

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for PhD course is INR 1.8 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection for PhD course will be based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) followed by a personal interview round. review_content.Placements: Bennett University has shown steady improvement in placements over recent years. Approximately 70 to 80 percent of students from my course are successfully placed. Top recruiting companies included Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: A modern well developed infrastructure that supports both academic and residential life. reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with this college as it is completely up to my expectations from the times groups.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students were placed in our course. The highest package was around 35 LPA, while the lowest was around 7-8 LPA, with an average package of around 13-14 LPA. The top recruiting companies are SAM, CAM, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are associates.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has 24/7 access to Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, classrooms, library, and hostel. In the hostel, we’ll be provided with 3 beds and a table for triple sharing, along with 3 almirahs. The complete campus is air-conditioned, the mess and canteen food is decent, and we have 24/7 medical facilities with AIIMS qualified doctors and various varieties of games.

overview_faqs.question: Is Bennett University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Bennett University is considered as a good university which offers quality education across various streams like Science, Engineering, Management, Commerce, and others. The university is accredited by the NAAC A+ Grade and recognised by the UGC, BCI and AIU. Bennett University is ISO-certified and collaborated with international organisations. The university has good placement statistics and the the highest and average salary offered to BTech batch 2025 was INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is Bennett University PhD fees?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PhD course is INR 1.8 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection for PhD course will be based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) followed by a personal interview round. BRAT is conducted by Bennett University and schedule for the same will be updated on the official website. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for each course is INR 1,500. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

overview_faqs.question: How is Bennett University for BTech in Computer Science?
overview_faqs.answer: Overall, the BTech in Computer Science programme at Bennett University is a good option for students who are very much interested in a career in the IT industry. The programme offers students with the knowledge and skills they need to succeed in a competitive job market. The accepted entrance exams for admission to BTech are SAT India, JEE Main, NEET, CUET, and others. Bennett University is approved by UGC (University Grants Commission) and is recognised by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research, Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of India as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (SIRO). Bennett University is ranked as a sixth Best School of Management, Top Private B-School under the University Programme category by IRF Ranking (North Zone). So overall Bennett University is a good university that offers BTech in Computer Science and various other courses to students.

review_summary.college_name: Bennett University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has the best campus life, food, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 500 companies came for placements. Big giants like Amazon, Google, Infosys, etc., hire students. For B.Tech, the highest package offered is 1.35 crores per annum. Many startups are also launched from our college every year. The college also provides funds for that. So overall, if we have the will, we can do it.
content.Infrastructure: It has the best facilities I could have ever imagined. It has centralised AC all over the campus and in the hostel also. Wi-Fi is also available here. Lounges are there which have different kinds of games. 2 gyms are also available here. Food is good. For medical facilities, we have a tie-up with Max Hospital.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Bennet university CSE records.

content.Placements: Good placements are available here at Bennett University. The highest package is 1.37cr, the average package is 11 LPA and the lowest package is 4 to 6 LPA. Top company visiting here are Microsoft, Amazon and KPMG. More than 90 percent of students got internship chance and the companies were IBM, Cisco, Goldman Sachs, AWS and many more. Top roles were Software Engineer, Machine Learning, Data Analyst, Backend intern and Cloud intern. 50 to 70 percent of students are placed in our course in the year 2025.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus has very good internet speed in academic blocks, hostels, as well as in library. Classrooms here have AC, a smart board as well as projectors. Labs are also there in my college with many of them have computer in them and used for project sessions. Hostels are very clean and have single, double, and triple bed options available. Rooms have good Wi-Fi speed, 24/7 security as well as good housekeeping. Food has both veg as well as non veg options with a wide variety. Doctors are available here during working hours. Ground and gym are also for any type of activity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive facilities and decent placement opportunities at Bennett University.

content.Placements: Bennett University has shown steady improvement in placements over recent years. Approximately 70 to 80 percent of students from my course are successfully placed. The package offered went up to 1.2 to 1.5 crore per annum international offers while the average package ranged between 6 to 8LPA and the lowest package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte etc.
content.Infrastructure: A modern well developed infrastructure that supports both academic and residential life. The classrooms are spacious, air conditioned and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High speed internet labs are well equipped with updated systems and software relevant etc.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with this college as it is completely up to my expectations from the times groups.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students were placed in our course. The highest package was around 35 LPA, while the lowest was around 7-8 LPA, with an average package of around 13-14 LPA. The top recruiting companies are SAM, CAM, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are associates.
content.Infrastructure: The college has 24/7 access to Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, classrooms, library, and hostel. In the hostel, we’ll be provided with 3 beds and a table for triple sharing, along with 3 almirahs. The complete campus is air-conditioned, the mess and canteen food is decent, and we have 24/7 medical facilities with AIIMS qualified doctors and various varieties of games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Bennett University: Best for technical learning.

content.Placements: We are having 90 batches, and each batch has 30 students. I am in batch 45 in the CSE course. I am in my first year. 78 percent of students get placed in the CSE course, and many students get off-campus placements. The average package offered in 2025 is 11.10 LPA, and the highest package is 13.7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college typically include classrooms equipped with modern teaching aids and labs with advanced equipment for practical. The library has an extensive collection of books and digital resources. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel includes accommodation, food, medical facilities, etc.

paragraphs: Bennett University admissionsare based both on the merit & entrance examinations. The university accepts national-level entrance examinations likeJEE Main,SAT India, etc., for admission to specific programmes. The university conductsBennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT)&BUMATfor PhD & MBA admission, respectively. Candidates can go for application to various course of their choice in online mode on the official website of the institute.Bennett Universityoffers 30+ courses at the UG, PG, PhD, diploma & certificate levels in multiple streams like Eng, Management, Science, Arts, etc.

Bennett University admission course admissionis subject to clearance of the priest eligibility criteria. Candidates need to complete Class 12 for UG courses & graduation for PG programmes. The applications for all the programmes are online. Check below popularBennett University coursesalong with their eligibility & selection criteria:

Bennett University's admission processincludes multiple steps such as registration, selection & admission confirmation. The criteria for selection vary course-wise. However, other steps are quite similar for all the programmes. Below are step-wise details forBennett University admissionsafter submitting the application form:

Bennett University selects candidates primarily based on the national-level entrance exam. SAT India is accepted for most of the UG courses. Entrance exams such as JEE Main, CMAT, CLAT, etc. are accepted for specific courses. The university also conductsBUMAT&BRATfor admission to MBA & PhD programmes.

Besides, the university also considers the merit of the candidates in the qualifying examination for admission. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for some of the courses.
Admission Confirmation

Once the candidates are selected, they need to bring the specified documents for verification. Aspirants also need to pay a programme fee to confirm their seat in the university. In case the candidate gets selected & is unable to pay the fee within the requisite time, his or her admission stands cancelled.

faqs.question: How to apply for PhD course at Bennett University?

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Bennett University through JEE mains?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can take admission through JEE Mains for BTech course. Apart from JEE Main, candidates can also apply through SAT India score for any of the BTech specialisation. Bennett University also accepts NEET score for BTech Biotechnology and integrated programme.Besides the entrance exam, candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility requirements. faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Bennett University?

faqs.question: Can I get into Bennett University without CAT?
faqs.answer: Bennett University offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. Bennett University admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MAT,  NMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMAT,  CUET,  BUMAT, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: Is admission open in Bennett University MBA?
faqs.answer: Bennett University admission is open for MBA and other courses. Students should visit the official website to know more and apply online. MBA course students can choose from various specialisations depending upon thir choice.

placement_data.title: Bennett University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Bennett University placement 2025 concluded with good outcomes. The highest and average salary offered to BTech batch 2025 was INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA . The highest and average package offered to MBA students was INR 33 LPA and INR 7.41 LPA . For BBA, the top and average salary stood at INR 23.5 LPA and 5.16 LPA . More than 450 recruiters visited the Campus for BTech placements, 143 for MBA, 85 for BBA and 44 for MCA placements. The top recruiters of Bennett University in 2025 included Microsoft, Google, Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, S&P Global, PwC, TCS, Berger Paints, Cvent, KPMG, etc .

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Bennett University offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MBA, BBA, BCA, etc. As per the latest report, the highest and average salary offered to BTech batch 2025 was INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA. The highest and average package offered to MBA students was INR 33 LPA and INR 7.41 LPA. For BBA, the top and average salary stood at INR 23.5 LPA and 5.16 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the placement of CSE in Bennett University?

Over 450 recruiters visited the university for BTech placements in 2025. According to the latest reviews provided by the BTech CSE students of Bennett University on Shiksha.com, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, TCS, Infosys, etc. are the major companies that visit the campus for placements.

faqs.question: What is Bennett University PhD fees?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PhD course is INR 1.8 lakh . Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection for PhD course will be based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) followed by a personal interview round. BRAT is conducted by Bennett University and schedule for the same will be updated on the official website. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for each course is INR 1,500. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

hostel.description:
The hostel has a capacity of accommodating 6000 students at a time. Bennett University, Noida Facilities include separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Rooms are designed with spacious rooms and are fully air-conditioned. The Hostel has provided with cable connection and high-speed internet facility.
Reading rooms and additional sports facilities like table-tennis rooms, chess, and carom rooms will also be available.
The overall charge of student’s discipline and hostel administration will be in the safe hands of the Chief Warden.

library.description:
Bennett University has two libraries - Central Library and Law Library
The Library is fully automated using KOHA with 3M electromagnetic/RFID enabled security gates, smart card, self-check-in and checkout, RFID dropbox, etc. It also provides the facility for the students to not only search books through the M-OPAC, but they can also renew books, reserve books, create virtual shelve for their reading and suggest book purchase for the library.
Law Library:
The college has a world-class law library with subjects covering various fields of study ranging from law, management to social sciences. The library currently is creating a database of wide-ranging national and international journals and e-resources like JSTORE, WESTLAW, KUWERONLINE, etc.
 It has an automated check-out system, and the students can access the databases externally from outside the campus during vacations and travel. The lending and returning of books are fully automated. Students can now transform their reading into a truly immersive experience with the newly launched Reading Room, with state-of-art furniture and a conducive environment that will foster student’s learning.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis Court, Snooker and Pool, Kabaddi Court

reviews.review_heading: It has the best campus life, food, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has the best facilities I could have ever imagined. It has centralised AC all over the campus and in the hostel also. Wi-Fi is also available here. Lounges are there which have different kinds of games. 2 gyms are also available here. Food is good. For medical facilities, we have a tie-up with Max Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Bennet university CSE records.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus has very good internet speed in academic blocks, hostels, as well as in library. Classrooms here have AC, a smart board as well as projectors. Labs are also there in my college with many of them have computer in them and used for project sessions. Hostels are very clean and have single, double, and triple bed options available. Rooms have good Wi-Fi speed, 24/7 security as well as good housekeeping. Food has both veg as well as non veg options with a wide variety. Doctors are a...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive facilities and decent placement opportunities at Bennett University.
reviews.review_text: A modern well developed infrastructure that supports both academic and residential life. The classrooms are spacious, air conditioned and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High speed internet labs are well equipped with updated systems and software relevant etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college as it is completely up to my expectations from the times groups.
reviews.review_text: The college has 24/7 access to Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, classrooms, library, and hostel. In the hostel, we’ll be provided with 3 beds and a table for triple sharing, along with 3 almirahs. The complete campus is air-conditioned, the mess and canteen food is decent, and we have 24/7 medical facilities with AIIMS qualified doctors and various varieties of games.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University: Best for technical learning.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college typically include classrooms equipped with modern teaching aids and labs with advanced equipment for practical. The library has an extensive collection of books and digital resources. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel includes accommodation, food, medical facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my course/department are decent. The classrooms have AC, we have 3 libraries, and Wi-Fi is good. The quality of the food at the mess is not great, the food doesn't taste great, but we have Domino's, Subway, Snapeats, and a lot of other options to eat from.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University unfiltered review by a CSE undergraduate.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for B.Tech computer science is very good. Every classroom, lab, mess, hostels, and all are air-conditioned. The classrooms are neat and clean. Classrooms have projectors, and whole campus is Wi-Fi operated also. There are many sports, so students can play any sport of their choice.

reviews.review_heading: Best university with good placement.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like an IMAC labs, a full centralized AC indoor basketball court, indoor gym, and there are about 200 labs in the college. There are two libraries, one dedicated to law students. There is Wi-Fi facility in the whole campus, and the classrooms are also modern.

reviews.review_heading: Totally worth the money if students work hard.
reviews.review_text: The labs are really well-organized and aligned in such a way that a student can learn in the most efficient manner. The hostels are pretty clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bennett University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and washrooms all over the campus are very clean. There are no such cases of ragging on the campus. Authorities are very strict in the case of ragging. The food quality is very good, and we are offered a wide range of dishes every week. The whole campus has good Wi-Fi range.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University CSE - My unfiltered review.
reviews.review_text: Bennett University has one of the best campuses (68 acres). The campus is a bit far from main city. But all the basic amenities are inside the campus only. Hostels are clean and rooms are of decent size. All the necessary labs are available with appropriate equipments.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement with supportive faculty and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Bennett University offers excellent infrastructure with smart classrooms, a fully Wi-Fi enabled campus, modern computer labs, and a huge library with digital resources. Hotels are clean and provide laundry, Wi-Fi, and common rooms. Food in the mess is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: University is not bad as you get exposure and will meet lots of great people too.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and hostels are also medium. But mess food is not really good at all. Labs and lecture halls are also nice. Hostel rooms are triple sharing, and they might be a bit small for three people. The food outlets are also not bad really.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett is good for hardworking students and supports them in startups and everything.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are all Ph.D. holders and are experienced. The infrastructure is very modern, and technology is used in everything. Everything is present at Bennett, such as super-Wi-Fi, labs for each subject, a very big library with 20k+ books. The quality of facilities in the hostel is very good because the rooms are clean and the hostel is safe. Medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: We have the hostel facility, and I would rate it 5 out of 5. There are 2 members in each room. We have a common bathroom, and rooms will be cleaned twice a day. If we have any issues, we can email them, and then they will solve the problem.

college_info.college_name: Bennett University

data.description: Bennett University faculty are well experienced and are research scholars themselves. In the past, they have taught in various top universities and colleges. One of the faculty has completed his education from Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia National Law University, Lucknow. The university also invites faculty for several guest lectures and various national and international conferences and also arranges seminars and workshops for students and teachers.

likes.text: Many renowned companies like Microsoft, Wipro, Cognizant, HP, Hitachi Consultancies, Samsung Display, Byju's, etc., visit the campus to recruit students.
As the first batch of law we got a chance to do internship with NALSAR, NLSIU Bangalore, NLU DELHI, TISC, TIMES OF INDIA, and many more.

college_info.college_name: Bennett University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Bennett University awards several scholarships to various meritorious undergraduate and postgraduate students. The Eligibility for various scholarships is determined based on the scores of the candidate in the last qualifying exam or the course-specific entrance examinations. Below mentioned are some of the scholarships offered at Bennett University:
Bennett University Scholarships
Merit Base Scholarship
Sibling Scholarships
Single Girl Child Scholarships
Sports Scholarships
Alumni Scholarships
Ward of Defence
Elite Scholarship
Defence Scholarship

Merit-Based Scholarship: The university offers scholarships based on the programme. The scholarship is based on various courses. Aspiring candidates must have to qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university. The below-mentioned are course-based scholarship ranges:
Sibling Scholarships: The scholarship of 10% is applicable for the duration of overlap of the programs of siblings and applicable to wards of the same parents and not cousins.
Single Girl Child Scholarship: The scholarship of 10% is applicable for the complete duration of the program on tuition fees.
Alumni Scholarship: The scholarship 10% tuition fee scholarship is available for Bennett University alumni who enrol in a postgraduate program at the university.

Sports Scholarship: The university offers up to 50% scholarship on first-year tuition fees is available for candidates with state, national, or international-level sports participation or achievements. Scholarships are subject to document verification at the time of registration.

Ward of Defence: The scholarship is offered for wards of serving and retired personnel from the Indian Armed Forces (Army, Navy, Air Force) and Paramilitary forces (CISF, BSF, CRPF, ITBP, NSG, and SSB) are eligible for a 5% scholarship on tuition fees. This scholarship is applicable for the entire duration of the program.

college_info.intro:
VIT Institute Chennai offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The university offers BTech and MBA programmes to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai courses are offered in full-time mode in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under these courses are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Finance, Marketing, and more.
VIT Chennai courses are recognised by the UGC and are offered in full-time mode. BTech CSE and MBA are highly in-demand courses for their excellent career prospects and high salaries. The university is also known for its BTech programme due to the experienced faculty members from not only India but abroad as well. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai in the table provided below:

reviews_list.review_title: VIT has best event culture.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students get placed in their 4th year, those who choose to sit for placements. The highest package goes up to 60 LPA and the lowest goes to 3-4 LPA. It depends on your course and branch. Top companies recruit only a few students, whereas there are mass recruiting companies as well which recruit in bulk. 60-70% of students get internships; the rest apply for off-campus internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have 5 academic blocks and one admin block - AB1, AB2, AB3, AB4, AB5. All blocks have classrooms and labs along with an amphitheater and staff rooms. We have a library that is open throughout the day and night, also till 12. Apart from this, we have many food courts as well, like Gazebo, North Square, Gym Khana, Hunger, and Domino's. Hostel blocks A, B, C, D1, and D2 all have mess included.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: On average, students are satisfied with the faculty, and placements all over depend on your hard wo

review_content.Placements: The percentage rate of getting placement is above 90% of the eligible students in the Chennai campus, and the eligibility criteria is getting 9+ CGPA in your branch. The highest package is 1.02 crores per annum with the average package of 14.4 LPA in the CSE branch and 9 LPA allover the B.Teach. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA by mass recruiters. Top recruitment companies are Amazon, Google, Adobe and many other tech companies for CSE.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities for the course are very proper and in good condition, like PCs in the lab are working properly, the equipment in lab and classroom is quite big enough for 60 students, and the library is also good, and the Wi-Fi in the labs is above 500 mbps. For sports and games, there are different clubs, and proper equipment is provided. The quality of food is not so good, but not so bad, it's quite average. There is a hospital on campus where you can get basic first aid and medicine.

faqs.answer: The admission to BTech programme in VIT Chennai takes place through the VITEEE exam and counselling. The aspiring students have to go through the following process for admission in BTech at VIT Chennai:Students have to submit VITEEE Application on viteee.vit.ac.inThe applications are verified and scrutinised by VIT.Students have to book a test slot and test center. The admit card for VITEEE is made available for download.Students have to appear for VITEEE.VITEEE results are announced.The online counselling process for BTech on the basis of VITEEE rank begins.Students have to give their programme and campus wishlist.On the basis of VITEEE rank, a provisional admission letter for BTech is given to the qualified candidates.The candidates have to verify their documents.
faqs.question: Q: What is the BTech admission process in VIT Chennai?

faqs.answer: VIT conducts the VITEEE exam as an entrance test for its BTech courses. Candidates have to pay a fee of INR 1350 for the VITEEE application while applying for the VITEEE exam. This fee is non-refundable. It can be paid by the students online. It needs to be paid before the deadline to apply successfully.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at VIT Chennai?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for VIT Chennai MBA is appoximately INR 7 lakh. Students have to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in institute. The total fee for MBA includes multiple components such as caution deposit, exam fee, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Which college has the most affordable tuition fees for an MBA out of VIT Chennai, GLIM Chennai, and XIME Chennai?
overview_faqs.answer: MBA at VIT Chennai has a total tuition fee of INR 6.97 lakh whereas GLIM Chennai has tuition fees of INR 9.45 – 11.5 lakh and XIME Chennai’s tuition fees is INR 9.7 lakh. Therefore, VIT Chennai has the most affordable tuition fees out of the three colleges.VIT Chennai also has the highest package out of the three colleges. Therefore, VIT Chennai has the highest net positive return on investment out of the three colleges offering MBA in Chennai.

overview_faqs.question: Is MTech from VIT Chennai worth it?

overview_faqs.question: Is VIT Chennai campus safe?

review_summary.college_name: VIT Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Extremely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Mostly 50% of the students will get placed in my course. The highest package offered in our course is 33 LPA by Amazon and PayPal, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA by TCS. 50% of the students get internships from our course from more companies that offer software engineer and developer roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is far better than that of other colleges. The campus is clean and green. There are more security measures in place, and the library is spacious with many useful books for the students. There are also many blocks of hostels, which are very convenient for the students who stay in them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review by batch 2025 passout.

content.Placements: About 80% students were placed in our 2025 batch. The highest package was around 1 Cr, and the lowest around 1-2 LPA, and the average must be around 5 LPA. ION Group, Accenture, TCS, and Cognizant were the companies with the highest recruitment on campus. SWE and Analyst roles were the most offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi goes out after 12 A.M. Food quality was based on how much money you are willing to pay. The library was congested during exam times. Classrooms were okayish. Quality of facilities were 7-10, you have to find your own good faculty members to get good grades. Good canteen for snacks.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: VIT has best event culture.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placed in their 4th year, those who choose to sit for placements. The highest package goes up to 60 LPA and the lowest goes to 3-4 LPA. It depends on your course and branch. Top companies recruit only a few students, whereas there are mass recruiting companies as well which recruit in bulk. 60-70% of students get internships; the rest apply for off-campus internships.
content.Infrastructure: We have 5 academic blocks and one admin block - AB1, AB2, AB3, AB4, AB5. All blocks have classrooms and labs along with an amphitheater and staff rooms. We have a library that is open throughout the day and night, also till 12. Apart from this, we have many food courts as well, like Gazebo, North Square, Gym Khana, Hunger, and Domino's. Hostel blocks A, B, C, D1, and D2 all have mess included.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: On average, students are satisfied with the faculty, and placements all over depend on your hard wo

content.Placements: The percentage rate of getting placement is above 90% of the eligible students in the Chennai campus, and the eligibility criteria is getting 9+ CGPA in your branch. The highest package is 1.02 crores per annum with the average package of 14.4 LPA in the CSE branch and 9 LPA allover the B.Teach. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA by mass recruiters. Top recruitment companies are Amazon, Google, Adobe and many other tech companies for CSE.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities for the course are very proper and in good condition, like PCs in the lab are working properly, the equipment in lab and classroom is quite big enough for 60 students, and the library is also good, and the Wi-Fi in the labs is above 500 mbps. For sports and games, there are different clubs, and proper equipment is provided. The quality of food is not so good, but not so bad, it's quite average. There is a hospital on campus where you can get basic first aid and medicine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Fear of getting placed relatively low in grading. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Its my first year in VIT. I chose these college mainly because of their placement records. It is pretty good compared to other private colleges. I enquired about this with seniors, and they too convey the same that VIT provides good placements. Only if you are 9 pointer you get an opportunity to attend a big MNC that will pay above 20LPA. Otherwise you will not be able to get into such superdream packages.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, here the hostel life is good compared to that of day scholars. Hostellers get to attend events that will regularly happen on the campus. Many events are conducted at night. Day scholars will leave the campus by 5 pm. We cant able attend campus events that take place at night. Hostels are good. Classrooms are decent, and the lab is good. Central library is one of the best places on the campus where we can get Wi-Fi at a very high speed and is fully air conditioned.

faqs.answer: VIT Chennai does not follow any category-wise seat reservation policy. Admission to the BTech programme in VIT Chennai is based on merit list that is prepared on the basis of the ranks obtained by the candidates in the VITEEE exam.
faqs.question: What is the seat reservation policy in VIT Chennai?

paragraphs: VIT Chennai admission 2026is open. The institute offers admission to candidates in some courses via its in-house entrance exam such as VITEEE for admission to the BTech programme, VITMEE for admission to MTech and MCA courses and VITREE for admission to the doctoral programmes. Check below the steps to get a seat in VIT Chennai:

Candidates can fill out the application form online on the official website of VIT. Aspirants need to also apply for entrance exam specific to their preferred course. The application fee varies course-wise.

Aspirants need to appear for VITEEE for BTech, VITMEE for some MSc, MTech and MCA courses and VITBEE for MBA. VIT conducts VITREE and VITLEE to select candidates for PhD and Law programmes, respectively. Admission to few courses such as BSc, BTech Fashion Techology, BBA, BCom (Hons) is merit-based. Such candidates need to pass a PI round for admission.
The institute also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as CLAT PG, AILET, CAT, MAT, etc. for specific courses.

Those who qualify for all the admission rounds specified by Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) Chennai are required to report to the admission cell at VIT Chennai for document verification and tuition fee payment leading to final seat allotment. Aspirants need to payVIT Chennai fees to confirm their seat in the institute.

Aspirants must secure 60% and above or equivalent CGPA in Class 10, Class 12, diploma/ UG/ PG degree to apply for M.Tech programme.
