placement_report.college_name: VIT Chennai Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: VIT Chennai Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: VIT Chennai has a robust Career Development Center that functions with the objective of providing best placement services to students. The Center provides the tools, resources and necessary guidance to students to explore career options and make informed decisions. Other than this, VIT Chennai CDC organises alumni events, hackathons, skill-development and placement training to groom students’ professional career. The V-NEST VIT Chennai Startup and Research Foundation has also been established. It acts a platform wherein faculty and students work together to transform their ideas into viable businesses. The primary focus areas of the Start-up and Incubation Centre (known as V-NEST) are in Clean Energy, Health Tech, Internet of Things, EdTech, IT and Robotics. As of now, V-NEST backs around 30 Startups at different growth stages. In addition to this, it also supports 20 student-run Startups from the University.

facilities: Professor L. John Kennedy, Division of Physics, School of Advanced Sciences, VIT Chennai: He is among the top 2% of Scientists in the world, in the field of “Materials” in a report by Stanford University, USA led by Dr. John P. A. Ioannidis and team, as published in PLOS.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is far better than that of other colleges. The campus is clean and green. There are more security measures in place, and the library is spacious with many useful books for the students. There are also many blocks of hostels, which are very convenient for the students who stay in them.

reviews.review_heading: Review by batch 2025 passout.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi goes out after 12 A.M. Food quality was based on how much money you are willing to pay. The library was congested during exam times. Classrooms were okayish. Quality of facilities were 7-10, you have to find your own good faculty members to get good grades. Good canteen for snacks.

reviews.review_heading: VIT has best event culture.
reviews.review_text: We have 5 academic blocks and one admin block - AB1, AB2, AB3, AB4, AB5. All blocks have classrooms and labs along with an amphitheater and staff rooms. We have a library that is open throughout the day and night, also till 12. Apart from this, we have many food courts as well, like Gazebo, North Square, Gym Khana, Hunger, and Domino's. Hostel blocks A, B, C, D1, and D2 all have mess included.

reviews.review_heading: On average, students are satisfied with the faculty, and placements all over depend on your hard wo
reviews.review_text: Facilities for the course are very proper and in good condition, like PCs in the lab are working properly, the equipment in lab and classroom is quite big enough for 60 students, and the library is also good, and the Wi-Fi in the labs is above 500 mbps. For sports and games, there are different clubs, and proper equipment is provided. The quality of food is not so good, but not so bad, it's quite average. There is a hospital on campus where you can get basic first aid and medicine.

reviews.review_heading: Fear of getting placed relatively low in grading. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, here the hostel life is good compared to that of day scholars. Hostellers get to attend events that will regularly happen on the campus. Many events are conducted at night. Day scholars will leave the campus by 5 pm. We cant able attend campus events that take place at night. Hostels are good. Classrooms are decent, and the lab is good. Central library is one of the best places on the campus where we can get Wi-Fi at a very high speed and is fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is mostly nice.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food in the mess differs a lot, both good and bad, and the internet quality is very bad most of the time. The course is overall fine, though just sometimes there are errors in the systems. Still, that is not very common, but once I had an exam and I was unable to login to the portals for a decent amount of time, although I was given extra time after that.

reviews.review_heading: Highlight placements infra connections and events.
reviews.review_text: Good and silent and can travel a greater distance inside campus. Many trees and all the shops for your needs stationery from ATM bank to cafe food court everything is inside. Hostel food is perfect. There is a wide variety of bookings for the hostel mess food too.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good, and I really like it, but the population is too high.
reviews.review_text: Labs are really good, world-class labs. Classrooms are very good but had no AC. It had a 3-floor library with almost all kinds of books. Hostel was good, with different kinds of mess, sports room, badminton court, gym, common area, etc., with AC rooms. Medical facilities were also good, as it is combined with Apollo.

reviews.review_heading: This is best in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was good for the students and faculty. This University offers many facilities, such as all-time Wi-Fi for the staff and students. The classrooms were fully air-conditioned. The hostels of this University were also very big and provided good quality food in the mess hall. At the hostel, there were many games organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: The food is difficult to habituate for people from the Telugu state.
reviews.review_text: Every hostel will have separate Wi-Fi systems. Students will be allowed to change their mess option each month. Dhobi service will be provided three times a month. Only labs will have air conditioning. Normal classrooms do not have air conditioning. Not all the facilities are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing social life with amazing faculty and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The course and infrastructure with classrooms and labs are top-notch, but with hostels, it's not the same thing. Hostel rooms are very crammed and less spacious. Mainly with hostel food, a lot of students get sick very frequently, and the washrooms don't have proper functioning most of the time around campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, strict and academically good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice. It has good condition grounds. All types of sports grounds are available. Classrooms are good. It has projectors, speakers, and well-maintained washrooms. Wi-Fi is not available in classrooms. Labs are well maintained and all instruments are top-notch. Computers are high-end.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. fashion design at VIT Chennai.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi for hostelers throughout the campus. We have labs for pattern making, garment construction, and CAD. Mess service in the hostel is good with options for vegetarian and non-vegetarian. We also have a Domino's and Lassi House on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This is my insight about the college. I would definitely recommend people joining here.
reviews.review_text: We have the best campus. It's 192 acres of land. We have gym, swimming pool, canteens, bank, supermarket, etc. Library here is the best. We have a wide range of books from academics to comics to magazines. During exam times, the library is open until 12:00 AM or even 2:00 AM. All the canteens are well maintained except few. You can see monkeys using the same cup as they give you for drinking water or anything for that matter. Talking about extracurricular, we have 2 grounds, cricket pitch, baske...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members, classes, library, hostel, mess food, ambulance services, and everything are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are pretty good. Generally, if we see in many other colleges, hostels are not that good but the prices are high but here the hostel is pretty decent. They provide both north and south Indian dishes. Free Wi-Fi, night canteen, and a small smart are also there. We have a health block and ambulance services are also available. We have a sports club and there are teams for different games and sports so you can join them. Labs, classrooms, and library are pretty good.

college_info.intro: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers 17+ courses across various streams. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce is known for its flagship MBA, BBA, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma and many other programmes. The course duration varies from 1 year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers postgraduate courses such as MBA, BBA, BDes, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma in the disciplines of Business Design, Human Resource Management, Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Analytics, Marketing and many more. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce's highest package during NIMS Jaipur placements 2023 stood at INR 20 LPA. The top recruiters of NIMS University Jaipur placements in 2023 included Goldman Sachs, Dell, TCS and many more. faqs.answer: A:    Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

review_content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

overview_faqs.question: How is the reputation of NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
overview_faqs.answer: NIMS University, located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, is a private university that offers various programs across multiple disciplines, including management and commerce. Here is some information about the management and commerce programs at NIMS University:Courses and Programs: NIMS University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in management and commerce. These programs cover a wide range of specializations, including finance, human resource management, marketing, international business, supply chain management, and more. The university provides both traditional classroom-based programs as well as distance learning options.Faculty: NIMS University has a diverse and experienced faculty consisting of professors, researchers, and industry professionals. The faculty members aim to impart knowledge, mentor students, and contribute to research and publications in their respective fields. They bring practical insights into the classroom to enhance the learning experience.Infr

review_summary.college_name: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.

content.Placements: NIMS University provides 100% placements to students. Top companies like Google, Amazon, Indigo, Oyo, and Bajaj Finance visit the college for placements. The university also provides paid internships to students. Students got a job from companies like Oyo, etc., as a consultant manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Event Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is good college for those who want to earn their degree easily, and its infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students in my course get placed during the recruitment drive. The highest package is 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average package of 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Just Dial, Neelam Aqua, etc. The most common roles offered are in finance, sales, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at my college is very good. They provide a library and smart classrooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi. The service in the hostel is on the point, they provide water heaters and water coolers on every floor. The food in the mess is above average. There is a sports complex that includes a basketball court, lawn tennis court, gym, and badminton courts.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Fashion Design and Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NIMS is the best university, that you can visit.

content.Placements: NIMS University allows students who score at least 60 percent in senior secondary and gives scholarships to those who score more than 80 percent. The top companies for my course is D-decor and many textile industries, like cotton industry, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The building of the college is very good. NIMS provides projectors and the best quality seats in all the classes, as well as the lab in which we perform our textile projects and a machine lab for our stitching project. Hostels also have good infrastructure.

paragraphs: Steps for NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce Admission Process 2026
The admission process at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce includes merit-list preparation/entrance exam scores. Find below the steps to get a seat in NIMS IMC:
1: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce Application Process 2026
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailed NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce fee structure here.
2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on merit or entrance exam score as per respective courses.
3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the process of admission for BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking forward to getting admission to NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce for BBA must have passed Class 12 exam with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in the case of students belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying exam. Those who apply need to submit their documents. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce follows a six-step admission process. The same is mentioned below:Visit the official website of NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce or the NIMS University.Fill out the form and upload all the relevant documents.Make payment for the application form.Get the online receipt of the online application form submitted on the official website.The admission team will verify all the documents received by them.Pay the academic fee and confirm your seat at the institute.

faqs.question: When are NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce application forms out?
faqs.answer: MBA application forms are available in July and August, while NIMSEE registration for UG programs, such as BBA, begins in December, and admission applications to the NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce must be submitted by April or May. They accept CAT/MAT, etc. scores for the MBA program. MBA application forms are available online on the institute's website in July and August. Applications and registration forms for NIMSEE are typically made available in December.The entrance exam takes place between January and February. The outcome is released in March. The entire application process, which includes registering for the NIMSEE, taking the entrance exam, and applying for admission, ends in May or June for NIMS undergraduate programs.

faqs.question: Can I get into NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: The best NIMS branch to get a well-rounded business education is the BBA in Marketing and Analytics. Advertising, sales, customer behavior, competitive analysis, etc. are the main topics of BBA marketing. It prepares people for careers in media planning, digital marketing, brand/product management, etc. Organizational development, labor laws, hiring, training, and other topics are covered in BBA HR. Key positions include recruitment specialist and HR manager. Data analysis, machine learning, and visualization are all part of BBA analytics. Two important career options are business analyst and data scientist. The BBA in Marketing and BBA in Analytics appear to be the best specializations among the options available, taking into account the demands of the industry today and in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

reviews.review_heading: It is good college for those who want to earn their degree easily, and its infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at my college is very good. They provide a library and smart classrooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi. The service in the hostel is on the point, they provide water heaters and water coolers on every floor. The food in the mess is above average. There is a sports complex that includes a basketball court, lawn tennis court, gym, and badminton courts.

reviews.review_heading: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: NIMS is the best university, that you can visit.
reviews.review_text: The building of the college is very good. NIMS provides projectors and the best quality seats in all the classes, as well as the lab in which we perform our textile projects and a machine lab for our stitching project. Hostels also have good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, NIMS College is good. Good faculty and placements are provided.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are present, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and good infrastructure. Hostel facilities are good; food quality is also good. Medical facilities are also available because this is a medical college. For sports, a gym and basketball ground are present, and games like Spardha are organized by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite decent. This is a good college. There are classrooms, libraries, transport facilities, conference rooms, auditoriums. Every year some events are done and some celebrations for special days. Hostel is good and hygienic food is provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with vast facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classes are well-equipped with a microphone and speaker, a projector for digital learning, and the best faculty members to support you and your educational needs. Day scholar but libraries and hostels are well-equipped with air conditioning and books with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Review on NIMS university.
reviews.review_text: In our college, smart classrooms, libraries, and Wi-Fi facilities are available. In our hostel unlimited water supply, proper electricity and in mess good quality of food is available etc. In the sports gym, a swimming pool, volleyball court, and basketball court are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, because of the activities; Good placement; Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, NIMS is one of the best colleges in the country, matching international standard. It had upgraded its classroom facilities, teaching with modern tools and technology. The college had air conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi, and library.

reviews.review_heading: You'll like the college at first after seeing its campus and functions.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are available, but there is no Wi-Fi available. Facilities in the hostel are very average. Regardless of the hostel, I would recommend taking a PG. The food served in the hostel mess is not good, and you don't want to eat food in the mess. The grounds for sports are useless.

reviews.review_heading: Over-all good for an average student.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for student use. They provide only 35mb for 1 day for students. Wi-Fi is available for only teachers and office use. And the library is well furnished. And my hostel facility is over all average. The quality of food and canteen is also average.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. It has a natural, healthy climate. Classrooms are huge and students feel comfortable. We have departmental libraries. You can get all the reference books of the best authors in the library. For medical students, good labs are available with machines. NIMS has a total of 14 departments.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best and number 1 institute ever.
reviews.review_text: Our college has world class infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than other colleges. Medical facilities are very good on campus. The hostel is very good. Campus life is good. If you live in the hostel, then your campus life would be very good. You will enjoy it very much.

highlights.summary: Apparel Training and Design Centre Gurgaon admissions 2024 are open for all the courses. Candidates can apply through the official website. A few more updates are as follows:

placements.overview: Apparel Training and Design Centre, is located in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. Established in 1996, it is a private institute. Apparel Training and Design Centre provides 78 UG and Certificate courses in 5 specialisations, namely Apparel Design, Fashion Design, Import & Export, Retail and Sales & Marketing. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time and Part Time modes. UG Diploma, B.Voc and Certificate are some of the courses offered at Apparel Training and Design Centre. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design and Beauty & Fitness. The total fee at Apparel Training and Design Centre ranges between INR 5,000 to 2,65,500. Apparel Training and Design Centre offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Fashion Design Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Apparel Training and Design Centre.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not offered. The staff also don't suggest students joining any company or organisation. They just teach and leave the class. If there is any doubt, they will clear it. Even if the placements are provided, the salary will be low.
review_content.Infrastructure: 4 stars are given for facilities and infrastructure. The faculty will just explain the content and leave. If the students ask for practicals, only then will they use the machines.
review_content.Faculty: There is no proper curriculum. The staff will come and teach in their free time or if they are interested. Exams are not conducted strictly, and no one will see if the students are cheating.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Fashion Design Technology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for learning new things.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our college even if we go out for interviews. The minimum salary offered is 5,000-7,000 per month. The teachers don't respond to this. At first, they said that they would provide jobs, but they didn't.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good compared to other colleges, but there is no use because teachers will not allow students to work on it. I don't know about hostels because I'm not a hosteler.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty are good and well educated. They teach students very well, but they will not force students to learn the subject. They will just come to the class and teach the subject and just leave the class. It's up to students to study.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Voc. in Fashion Design and Retail - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 1. 90% of students are placed in various export and other garment factories. 2. 1 Lakh is the highest package. 3. Exporting companies, garment factories, boutique and industry designers come to hire the students. 4. Designer, Merchandiser, Quality Controller are the roles offered. 5. 10,000 to 30,000 is the salary range. 6. 90% of students got internship in exporting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms have unbelievable infrastructure with proper desks and benches with blackboards and other favilities like Computer lab and Smart Classes. 2. They giving extraordinary facilities in hostel. Separate cots and shelves with full security. The foods is great and tasty.

college_info.intro:
Jaipur National University offers UG, PG and PhD programmes through 8 schools of study. BTech, BSc, BCA and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university. The college offers BTech programmes for the duration of 4-years in full time mode. The BTech programme in ten specialisations such as Biotechnology Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence Engineering, Machine Learning Engineering, Cyber Security Engineering, etc.
JNU University Jaipur is attributed to its industry-centric curriculum developed in collaboration with companies such as Aditya Birla Group, Tata Motors, Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro, ITC, Smart Cube, Byju’s, Capgemini, and others, aimed at enhancing graduate employability. Below are some of the courses offered by Jaipur National University and their respective eligibility and Jaipur National University fees:

exams: Jaipur National University Combined Entrance Test

placements.overview:
Jaipur National University has a placement cell, known as the JNU Jaipur Placement Cell, which works to bridge the gap between the students’ competencies and the industry's needs. The placement cell manages all the placement-related activities and induces different companies to take part in the university’s placement drive.

Jaipur National University placements held recently, the highest package offered was INR 70 LPA to the school of Media Studies. While the highest packages offered to school of business and management and school of engineering and technology were INR 12 LPA and INR 27 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters who took part that time were Tata Motors, Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro, ITC, Smart Cube, Capgemini, etc.

student_insights.feedback: Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average campus experience with decent academics and good annual fest.

review_content.Placements: Around 65 percent of students from our course got placed. The highest package offered is about 30 LPA, while the lowest is around 2 LPA. Major recruiters include SIFS India, various State FSLs, private forensic consultancies, diagnostic labs, and research organizations. About 45 percent of students secured internships in different FSLs and private laboratories. The top roles offered in our course are Forensic Expert/Analyst, Lab Assistant, Laboratory Technician, Crime Scene Investigator, Toxicology/DNA/Serology Technician, and Research Assistant, providing students with diverse opportunities in both government and private forensic sectors.

faqs.answer: Yes, students can definitely pursue a BPharm degree after completing a DPharma programme at Jaipur National University. Usually, when students finish their DPharm diploma, they don't have to start BPharm from the first year. Instead, they can join in the second year of the BPharm course. This is called lateral entry. So, instead of a four-year course, BPharm will only take three years for them. This is a popular way to continue studying because it helps students to learn more and get a higher degree in Pharmacy. Therefore, students can join the BPharm after completing DPharm at JNU Rajasthan.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fees of BCom programme at Jaipur National university?
overview_faqs.answer: The total fees of the Jaipur National University BCom course include fees like tuition fees, hostel fees, caution money, various one-time charges, etc. The total tuition fees range between INR 51,000 and INR 1.74 lakh. The hostel fees of BCom at JNU Rajasthan range is around INR 70,000 per year. Before shifting to the hostel rooms, you need to pay 25,000 i.e., a refundable charge. The one-time payment includes caution money i.e., INR 2000. Source: Multiple external sites, hence the info may vary.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel accommodation fee for BA students at Jaipur National University?
overview_faqs.answer: Jaipur National University has three campuses. SADTM campus has girls' hostel and other two campuses have boys' hostel. The hostel fee varies from campus to campus, type of accomodation selected by the students and it changes every year. Currently, the hostel fees for BA students at JNU Rajasthan, as per accomodation are: Type of AccomodationHostel Fees Non-AC, double sharing atached roomINR 2.10 Lacs (for three years)AC, double sharing attached room INR 2.71 Lacs (for three years)The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. Therefore, it is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Jaipur National University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I give the college a rating of 8 out of 10.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students get placements from the university, and the highest package is 300,000. The top recruitment companies are Amazon, Flipkart, and some pharmacy companies. The roles offered in the course are management, and the top roles offered in the course involve managing a company.
content.Infrastructure: The rooms of the hostels are good, and the food is also good. The infrastructure is good, the faculty is amazing, and the Wi-Fi on the campus is available. There is also the availability of digital classrooms, and there are many seminars held in the university related to your course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the campus, supportive faculty, and well-maintained infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our course, a minimum of 75 percent is required in academics to get placed. The lowest packages range from 3 to 5 LPA. The maximum package is 70 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Infosys and more visit the college for placements. 80 percent of the students got internships at Japan University.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Classrooms, library, and computer rooms are available. Hostel facilities are good, and there is a strong focus on keeping the hostel clean. The quality of the food served in the college canteen and hostel mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average campus experience with decent academics and good annual fest.

content.Placements: Around 65 percent of students from our course got placed. The highest package offered is about 30 LPA, while the lowest is around 2 LPA. Major recruiters include SIFS India, various State FSLs, private forensic consultancies, diagnostic labs, and research organizations. About 45 percent of students secured internships in different FSLs and private laboratories. The top roles offered in our course are Forensic Expert/Analyst, Lab Assistant, Laboratory Technician, Crime Scene Investigator, Toxicology/DNA/Serology Technician, and Research Assistant, providing students with diverse opportunities in both government and private forensic sectors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Helpful faculty, industry-relevant curriculum, fair exams, good placements, and active campus life.

content.Placements: My course is BCA, and I am from the passing-out batch of 2025. Around 60 percent of students from our course are successfully placed. The highest package is 3 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, and a few startups. About 60 percent of students received internships in reputed organizations such as Infosys, TCS, HCL, and local IT startups.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and access to a central library with updated resources. Hostel facilities are good, with decent food. It has basic medical support and sports/games amenities. It makes students' life comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Positive stone - Comprehensive learning with strong practical exposure and good campus life.

content.Placements: There are multiple hospitals, and they are bonded with the college for hiring the multi-talented students in large numbers so this assures students of placement safely with a good package. Those students with lower skills also have the option to work in their own college hospital which is multi-specialty.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is Wi-Fi enabled, ensuring uninterrupted internet access for both academic and personal use. Sports facilities, including grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball, as well as indoor games like table tennis and carrom, encourage physical fitness and recreation. Campus also includes a clean cafeteria, medical room, and student common areas. Hostel facilities are decent and cater to both comfort and safety. Rooms are generally shared between two or three students and are adequately furnished with beds, study tables, and storage. Hostel premises are secure with 24X7 surveillance and wardens on duty. Cleanliness is well-maintained, with regular housekeeping.

admission_overview.college_name: Jaipur National University Admissions 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Application and Selection

admission_overview.title: Jaipur National University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Jaipur National University admission 2026 is merit and entrance-based. The college offers various courses to candidates at the UG, PG, Diploma and PhD levels. Jaipur National University Courses are offered in the streams of Business and Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, IT and Software, Law, Engineering, Humanities and Social Sciences, etc. For entrance-based admission, Jaipur National University conducts JNU Entrance cum Scholarship Test (JEST) for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, MTech, MPharm, BA LLB, etc. However, merit-based admissions are valid for some of the UG/PG courses.

paragraphs: JNUoffers admissions based on merit or entrance exam scores of the aspirants. The university conductsJoint Entrance cum Scholarship Test or JSETfor admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
Jaipur National University Application Process
Candidates can fill out theJNU application formonline for a course. Candidates have to pay an application fees online for a course.
Selection Process

Candidates are offered admission based on their scores in entrance exam or qualifying exam. The university considers academic performance of the candidates. Selected aspirants must also pass the personal interview round for final admission.
Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates need to report at the campus for document verification. Candidates must pay theJNU feesto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to B.Tech at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University admissions are completely entrance-based for BTech. Candidates have to appear for Joint Entrance cum Scholarship Test for admission. Selected candidates have to further pass the personal interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: Is there any change in application fees in Rajasthan JET 2024 exam?
faqs.answer: The exam conducting authorities have changed the application fees in year 2024. For JET the application fees isINR 1600 for General, EWS, OBCand candidates from outside Rajasthan state. While it isINR 1300for SC/ST and /SAP (40% and above disability) of Rajasthan.This application fees is for JET and Pre PG exam while for PhD course it isINR 3700for UR, EWS and OBC applicants and for all others it isINR 2500.

faqs.question: Can I pursue D.Pharm course at Jaipur National University through distance education?
faqs.answer: No, the DPharm course is not available in distance mode at Jaipur National University. The DPharm programme at JNU Rajasthan is a regular, full-time two-year Diploma course. It focuses on providing students with fundamental knowledge and practical skills in pharmaceutics, pharmaceutical chemistry, pharmacognosy, and basic pharmacology. To get admission to this course students have to meet the eligibility criteria that are explained in the above sections.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BBA at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University, Jaipur BBA admission is based on entrance exams/ last qualifying exam. For admissions, it is mandatory for students to qualify for either an entrance exam or secure valid scores in Class 12/ higher senior secondary. JNU Jaipur accepts applications through both online and offline modes. Interested students can apply directly through the official website or by visiting the campus.

faqs.question: How can I apply at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University application process is online. Students can check the step-wise application process below:For registration, candidates need to submit the entrance exam score for the respective test they have appeared for. The entrance exam scorecards have to be submitted at the time of registration.Candidates can fill out the application form in both online and offline modes.The selection process of Jaipur National University includes an examination of candidates based on their scores in an entrance exam.The admission panel will also evaluate the candidates based on their academic accomplishments during the selection process.Candidates shortlisted as per the course eligibility & selection rounds will have to submit the prescribed admission for the respective course.Following this, candidates are required to go through the document verification and are intimated about the date of commencement of the classes.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University gives admission to the students either by Merit basis or Entrance Test. The JNU Jaipur accepts scores of exams like CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT for admission to MBA. The process for admission is offline as well as online.Jaipur National University offers various undergraduate and postgraduate courses to students, some of them are BTech, MSc, BBA, BSc, BEd and many more. It has different streams like Commerce, Management, Pharmacy, Hotel Management, Science, Design, Computer Applications, Engineering, Arts, Paramedical, Medical, Animation, Mass Communication, Law, Agriculture, Aviation, and Vocational Courses. It even provides honors courses for the students.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BCom placements at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University provides placement assistance to BCom graduates and other course graduates, the top recruiters for JNU Rajasthan from the last five years are Infostretch, NIIT Technologies, Amazon, Intel and HP. Whereas, the names of the recruiters who have continued to visit JNU Rajasthan for more than two placement seasons are LG, Byjus, and Infosys. Some other names of the companies that visit for placements are IBM, HDFC Bank, Pay Pal, Bank of America, Morgan Stanley and many others. Note: Due to the unavailability of information on the companies hiring specifically the BCom students of the university, the data presented above is relevant for all courses offered at Jaipur National University.

faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Sc in Fashion Designing at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University -JNU offers a three-year Bachelor of Science in Fashion Design. According to the university, throughout the programme, students engage in challenging creative projects, ensuring they graduate with the knowledge and expertise to effectively lead and manage roles in garment export houses, fashion, and lifestyle sectors. The total tuition fee for three-year BSc in Fashion Designing courses is INR 53,500 per annum, which means for three years the fee is 1.6 lakh .

faqs.question: What is the hostel fees for BCom students at Jaipur National University?
faqs.answer: Jaipur National University has three campuses. Sadtm campus has girls' hostel and other two campuses have boys' hostel. The hostel fee varies from campus to campus, type of accomodation selected by the students and it changes every year. Currently, the hostel fees for BCom students at JNU Rajasthan, as per accomodation are: Type of Accomodation Hostel Fees Non-AC, double sharing atached room INR 2.10 Lacs (for three years) AC, double sharing attached room INR 2.71 Lacs (for three years) The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. Therefore, it is indicative.

description: Jaipur National University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Jaipur National University NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 888693 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Jaipur National University MBBS cutoff 2025 was 888693 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Jaipur National University CAT Cutoff 2025 is yet to be announced. In the meantime, students can refer to the table below to know the Jaipur National University CAT Cutoff 2024 for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. The CAT Cutoff 2024 was 70 for General All India candidates. See the table below for more details.

Jaipur National University MBA cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to its MBA/PGDM course. The Institute does not release the final CAT cutoff publicly and is only accessible through account login to those candidates who appear in the CAT exam. Hence, the available cutoff table below is based on previous years’ trends and the actual cutoffs might vary.
CAT is the accepting exam to be eligible for admission to the MBA/PGDM course. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to view the important CAT 2025 dates.
Candidates applying for admission to the MBA/PGDM course at Jaipur National University may refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated CAT cutoff lists.
The institute accepts admission to MBBS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
MBBS Cutoff 2025 was, 873659 in Round 1, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 888693 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

outlook.description:
As per the overall score, Jaipur National University has been placed at a good position by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Engineering (Private)' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
One can observe that within the category of 'Science', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jaipur National University's rank is #92, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Jaipur National University's rank is #69, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'BCA' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jaipur National University's rank is #45, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Jaipur National University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Jaipur National University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, Jaipur National University fell 500 ranks to #1401 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2026, Jaipur National University fell 162 ranks to #454 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jaipur National University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University has separate Wi-Fi enabled hostels for boys and girls equipped with an air-cooling system. Facilities such as mess, RO water supply, laundry, 24 hours electricity and water supply has been provided to each and every hostel. TV with DTH and telephone is available. For recreation chess and carom, common room with daily newspapers and magazines are available at all the hostels. Rooms are available on single-seated, double and triple sharing basis. Dormitories are also available. Some AC rooms with attached washroom are also available. An international hostel for foreign students are also provided. Medical checkup with first-aid facility is supported by JNU Hospital. Security guards are available round the clock.

library.description: JNU has fully automated libraries comprises of around 100000+ books and a number CDs & DVDs. Book section includes text books, reference books and standard patents. Subscribed to international journals and an access to journals like IEEE-XPlore, JGate, Bentham, Nature, Manupatra. Reference section has incorporated rare and expensive books and encyclopedias. It has an Open Public Access Catalogue to indicate subjects. Also facilitates photocopy and internet service. Book bank facility is also available in the library. It has a reading space for individuals, lounge area for browsing and relaxed reading and an IT zone for accessing e-resources.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Hi-Tech Sports Complex

These cafeterias also serve as meeting places for the students and provide them an opportunity to both socialize and share their academic interests and engagements. One can get freshly made gourmet sandwich, a cup of hot coffee, a cup of noodles, or a sweet treat at any of the campus cafés.

reviews.review_heading: I give the college a rating of 8 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: The rooms of the hostels are good, and the food is also good. The infrastructure is good, the faculty is amazing, and the Wi-Fi on the campus is available. There is also the availability of digital classrooms, and there are many seminars held in the university related to your course.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus, supportive faculty, and well-maintained infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Classrooms, library, and computer rooms are available. Hostel facilities are good, and there is a strong focus on keeping the hostel clean. The quality of the food served in the college canteen and hostel mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Average campus experience with decent academics and good annual fest.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Forensic Science course at Jaipur National University is average. Labs for Biology, Chemistry, and Forensics are functional but not very advanced. Classrooms have projectors and basic facilities. Wi-Fi works but is inconsistent. The library has a decent but limited collection. Hostel rooms are simple with average cleanliness and maintenance. Mess food is basic and repetitive, while the canteen offers moderate-quality snacks. Medical support includes a first-aid room wi...

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty, industry-relevant curriculum, fair exams, good placements, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our course has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and access to a central library with updated resources. Hostel facilities are good, with decent food. It has basic medical support and sports/games amenities. It makes students' life comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Positive stone - Comprehensive learning with strong practical exposure and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Campus is Wi-Fi enabled, ensuring uninterrupted internet access for both academic and personal use. Sports facilities, including grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball, as well as indoor games like table tennis and carrom, encourage physical fitness and recreation. Campus also includes a clean cafeteria, medical room, and student common areas. Hostel facilities are decent and cater to both comfort and safety. Rooms are generally shared between two or three students and are adequately furn...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and the campus is also good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are great. There are many smart classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in every building on my campus. Labs are above average. The canteen is good. The mess is also above average. Medical facilities are average. Gamess courts are nice.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. The only flaw is long class timing.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jaipur National University.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts modern infrastructure with supplementary resources. The library contains a diverse collection of books, novels, and journals. The canteen is spacious, offering a variety of food items in a comfortable setting. A large number of students reside in the hostel, which is also well-managed. The food provided is also satisfactory and meets basic quality standards.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for admission.
reviews.review_text: There are several amenities in the hostel where I stay, including a library and a mess. The hostel feels like home to us, and it appears that students reside there. We also keep our classrooms tidy and well-maintained. Every piece of equipment, including the board and watch, is fully functional in the classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied with everything.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Every lab is available, proper cadaver exposure is provided to every student. Wi-Fi is not that good. Classrooms are pretty huge and neat. Library is very big and every book related to course and literature is available. Must join this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: According to our code, the price structure of my college is satisfactory. There is one projector available, and the classrooms feature white walls with white marker boards, and lights, but there is no air conditioning. AC is only available in the hostel, which also has amenities such as Wi-Fi. The rooms are good, with options for two-seater and three-seater accommodations.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission after visiting once take a time and ask the students.
reviews.review_text: No facility available in fact fans are not working properly. Hostel food is of very cheap quality. Canteen has high amount of food. No medical facility is there. Sports facilities are available. In boys hostel everyday there is a fight at dinner time because of less amount of food.

reviews.review_heading: College was overall good, but some issues needed to be fixed.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good, but during the hot season, like summer, it becomes uncomfortable because there are no air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and the drinking water is good. Other facilities, such as cleanliness and proper waste management, are also maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: Time of college days in JNU.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were also good. But in some area, Wi-Fi speed was not good. Library was very good, neat, and clean. I have enjoyed whatever facilities I got in my college. If you had good skills and the ability to gain knowledge. There were 3-4 parks. Canteen food was also good but food was overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and jobs in JNU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is much better. It is totally built in the old Rajasthan style and gives old Rajasthan vibes. Classrooms and labs are embroidered into smart classrooms and labs. We have multiple labs for one thing. I can see labs like Java lab, food testing lab, and food inspection labs. There is Wi-Fi accessibility for you throughout college to register yourself on the college website or use the college number, and here we go, you can access the internet all over the college.

highlights.summary: The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at GNDU include BSc (Hons), MSc, BTech & LLM, among others. After doing BSc, students can have a career in IT, Software Development etc. GNDU also has a Directorate of Open & Distance Learning (ODL) located at its main campus for distance & open programmes. By doing various courses from Guru Nanak Dev University, students can get job offers from top recruiters like Amazon, Accenture, Axis Bank etc.
In addition to this, Guru Nanak Dev University offers UG, PG, diploma, short-term, & certificate programmes across various fields eg Engineering, Science, Law, Arts & Humanities, Commerce & Accounting, Computers & IT, Management, Journalism, Architecture & Pharmacy, among others. faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: No placement, affordable.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the college. 30% of students get jobs by themselves. There are no big companies. No internship is provided by the college. This college is not for placement. It is only for getting a degree. In Science, we only get knowledge of Science theoretically.
content.Infrastructure: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements for the BCA course are okay and mostly depend on how much effort a student puts in. Around 40-50% of students get placed, and many find jobs on their own. The average salary is around 2-3 LPA. Internships are also available in small IT companies, and common roles are IT support, junior developer, and customer support.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,

content.Placements: The placement cell was a huge add-on to my career path. They instantly initiated the process of the placement and related stuff when I entered my 2nd last semester of the curriculum. They provided us companies for internships and full-time placements and introduced us to companies that are dream companies for many. Many companies come on campus, including local companies of the state, Byjus, Wipro, TCS, Amazon, Datalog, etc. The company with the highest package offers 14 Lacs. If you sit in placement, a minimum of 7.5 CGPA is required, and there were different criteria for placement.

paragraphs: GNDU admissionto all courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university offers courses at UG, PG, and doctorate levels. Additionally, students can also pursue certificate courses at the university. Programmes offered atGNDUare in streams including –Engineering,Architecture& Planning,IT & Software,Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education, Science, and Law. The application process for the university is conducted online. Students seeking admission to the programmes offered at the university can read the following article to know the detailed process of theGNDU admission procedure.

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) admissionto some courses is ongoing. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple specialisations through its constituent colleges. Guru Nanak Dev University course admissionis both entrance and merit-based depending on the programme selected by the students. Each aspirant must meet the course-specific eligibility requirements to be eligible for the course admission at the university. Candidates can pursue a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations in a variety of fields at the university. The university accepts various national-level entrance tests. Furthermore, it also conducts its own entrance test for admission to some of the courses. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularGNDU courses:

Guru Nanak Dev University feesvary for each course and specialisation. The university charges multiple components from the students such as admission fees, tuition fees, security deposits etc. GNDU students are required to pay the amount either semester-wise or annually, depending on the course selected. Interested candidates can check out the below table forGNDU course feesin the table below:
Check out completeGNDU Fee Structure
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar seatintakevaries for each course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the selection rounds. Candidates must pay the admission fee to secure their seat at the university. Students can look at the table below to know course-wiseGNDU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes.
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

As per the information available on the official website of the University,GNDU admissionto various courses is either based on merit or an entrance exam, depending on the course selected. Foradmission to the BTechcourse, aspirants have to appear forJEE Main entranceand admission to the MBA course candidates are required to appear for theGNDU Management Entrance Test (GMET). For all courses, admission is done based on the merit secured by the candidates in the entrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department. Candidates seeking admission to GNDU courses must begin their admission process by filling out the application form before the deadline. The step-wiseGNDU admission processis given in the table below:
Step 1: GNDU application process
Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay the application fees before the deadline.
Step 2: GNDU Selection Process

Admission to most of theGNDU courses is entrance-based. Only for diploma-level courses, the admission criteria is merit-based. Applicants applying to BTech and MBA courses are required to appear forJEE Main and GMET,respectively, to get shortlisted for admission. Apart from BTech and MBA, the University shortlists candidates based on theentrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department.
Step 3: GNDU Merit list and Admission confirmation

After completing the selection process,GNDU releasesa course-wise merit list on its official website. All the candidates, whose name is on the merit list, are required to appear for the counselling/ interview process for seat allocation and document verification process.

courses_data.name: GNDU MBA/PGDM Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) MBAis offered with multiple specialisation options such asFinance,HRM,Marketing, etc. The University Business School and the University School of Financial Studies offer the MBA course.GNDUMBA admission is based on merit in theGuru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). Selected candidates are allotted seats through counselling. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any stream from a recognised University are eligible to apply for admission atGNDU MBA. More highlights related toGNDU MBAare mentioned below:

faqs.question: How can I take admission in GNDU to pursue MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to GNDU MBA programmes need to take the Guru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). The university shortlist candidates based on exam score. The selected candidates have to participate in the counselling during which the final seat allotment is carried out. Moreover, to apply for the entrance exam, candidates can visit the official website of Guru Nanak Dev University.

faqs.question: How will I know if I have been shortlisted for GNDU GMET counselling?
faqs.answer: The University will release a merit list of candidates selected for the counselling round on its official website soon after the declaration of GNDU GMET result. The shortlisted candidates will have to appear at the university main campus for interview rounds along with the required documents. Candidates must report at the alloted date and time, failing which candidate's request for change in date and time will not be entertained.

faqs.question: When will GNDU GMET registrations commence?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University conducts GMET for admission to Management courses offered at its Main and regional campuses. The university usually opens registration for GMET in May and closes by second week of July. The exam is usually conducted in July every year in online mode for 150 minutes.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in GNDU without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, for some course, GNDU takes admission without entrance exam. The admission to those courses is allotted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.Admission to following GNDU courses is based on merit in the qualifying exam:UG CoursesPG coursesBTech (Urban &Regional Planning)MEdBachelor of Tourism & Travel Management .PG Diploma in Mental Health CounselingBAPG Diploma in TranslationBScMCom, MSc MathematicsBPTMBA, MCA, MSc (IT), MSc (Maths), MA (Eco), MA Punjabi, MCom

faqs.question: How much percentage required for GNDU?
faqs.answer: Minimum percentage for GNDU admission in some popular courses are:CoursesEligibilityBE/BTechClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)MBA/PGDMClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)UG DiplomaClass 12BScClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BCAClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BComClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)

faqs.question: Which entrance test score is accepted by Guru Nanak Dev University for BCom?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. To appear for this exam, candidates must fill out an application form on the official website of the university. Based on the performance in this exam, a merit list is prepared. The applicants who manage to get shortlisted are allotted seats, provided they present the require documents supporting their eligibillity.

placement_data.title: Guru Nanak Dev University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Guru Nanak Dev University has released the salary details for the batch passed out in 2025. The highest package secured by batch 2025 was INR 44 LPA , while the average package offered during GNDU placements 2025 was INR 6.37 LPA . The University has placed 84.89% students in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Guru Nanak Dev University in 2025 include Amazon, Accenture, Coca Cola, Capgemini, Dabur, IBM, etc.

Earlier, 652 students were placed during the 2024 placement session. The highest and average packages stood at INR 18.43 LPA and INR 6.40 LPA , respectively. KPMG, Accenture, Nucleus Software were among the few top recruiters of GNDU.

tables.context: Is GNDU good for placement?
How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?

faqs.question: Is GNDU good for placement?
faqs.answer: A total of 79 companies offered job opportunities to the students passing out in 2024. The highest package stood at INR 18.43 LPA and the average package offered was INR 6.40 LPA. Check the complete insights of Guru Nanak Dev University placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 652 Highest package INR 18.43 LPA Average package INR 6.40 LPA No. of companies offered jobs 79

faqs.question: How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?
faqs.answer: The University has released the overall placement data on its official website. From 2022 to 2024, the number of students placed has declined year-on-year. On the other hand, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the number of companies that offered job opportunities. Refer to the table below for a detailed analysis of GNDU placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 993 875 652 No. of companies offered jobs 88 61 79

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the 2024 passing-out batch was INR 18.43 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 19.57 LPA. Looking at the past three years' statistics, declining trend was recorded in the Guru Nanak Dev University the highest package, which is depicted below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 44 LPA INR 19.57 LPA INR 18.43 LPA

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University can lead to bright career opportunities in various sectors. The career prospects primarily depend on a variety of factors such as, chosen specialisation, preferred sector, skills of the graudates, etc. The university offers a BSc in various specialisations. BSc graduates of the university can build careers in the fields of education, IT, healthcare, research, etc. For better career prospects after a BSc , graduates can pursue higher education with courses like MS, MSc or MBA.

highlights.description: GNDU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #12 by the India Today 2025 under the University (Government) category. It ranked #77 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The GNDU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
GNDU is consistently recognized as one of the top institutes across all major categories by NIRF 2023. It has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2023, GNDU fell 7 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, GNDU fell 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. In the 'University' category, GNDU ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Students can refer to the table below for the GNDU NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
GNDU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 43 ranks to #329 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 9 ranks to #77 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
There are two messes and two canteens in the hostel and both are run on a contract basis. There are some indoor games facilities like table tennis, carom board, volleyball and two badminton courts are also available within the premises of the hostel for the students. The students have access to the internet through Wi-Fi in all the rooms. Girls hostel is well-equipped with facilities like the internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photo state, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. 
Local students from within a radius of 40 kilometres (25 kilometres in case of girls), evening students, employees and part-time students are not eligible for admission to the hostel.
facilities: Holds approximately 543,357 documents, including books, bound journals, theses, reports and manuscripts.
Subscribes to about 134 Indian journals, 52 foreign journals, and 24 newspapers, and has acquired over 15,600 e‑books.
Rare and manuscript collections include around 5,174 rare books and 1,511 manuscripts.

library.description:
The library remains open on all the days of the year except on two National Holidays i.e. 26th January and 15th August. It opens from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays and 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekends and other holidays. 
Bhai Gurdas Library is subscribing 87 Foreign and 146 Indian Journals. In addition to it, a library is also receiving about 150 journals as a gift. The library is a member of INFLIBNET which is providing access to 15,000+ e-journals and six databases. The library is also subscribing more than 200 journals through IEEE. It have 1,516 rare manuscripts relating to Punjab History, Culture, Sikh Religion and other faiths. There are 22 departmental libraries also for the convenience of the students and teachers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Handball Court, Softball Court, Kho- Kho, Kabbadi, Hockey stadium, Archery, Velodrome
