reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Saroop Rani Government College For WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: No placement, affordable.
reviews.review_text: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Teg Bahadur College, SathialaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think this college can be improved with some changes.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Lyallpur Khalsa CollegeReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDUReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,
reviews.review_text: It was a very good course to learn about programming languages; they were very focused on practicals so we could learn effectively. Every month, they hold special sessions so students can share their innovative ideas, giving the basic and advanced knowledge of C, C++, Java, JavaScript, MySQL, etc. In the first two semesters, basic knowledge of computers is given along with the main course. Hostel facilities were available at reasonable charges, and the room sizes were good. The food was hygienic...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: They conduct less interactive classes, which are so boring.
reviews.review_text: Only the exact number of students is admitted to all the courses to lessen the crowd and to improve the performance. Sports and other physical activities are scheduled only once a week. There are certain liberties in hostel premises and other things. We visit the library only during free periods and break hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Baring Union Christian CollegeReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are well-qualified, but placement through this college seems next to impossible.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. It is good enough to stay focused. Surroundings are also clean and tidy. There are no issues with the infrastructure because the classrooms are spacious. Moreover, the library also has a large volume of books in every niche.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility was available. The library was also present. Modern classroom and computer labs. Hostel quality was also good. All essential amenities were available in the college. Sports and games were encouraged by the University.

reviews.review_heading: MBA at GNDU: Fees, placement and faculty overview.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent for the course and hostel. Adequate lighting, ventilation and fans are available in classrooms and hostel rooms. The department also has Wi-Fi and projectors for students and teachers. There are ramps for wheelchairs as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Amritsar Group of CollegesReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life, hostel life was good, but some of the teachers were so rude.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and structures are normal, not that good and not too bad. It's like okay. Wi-Fi is available at every point in the college. Labs are there, but not for agriculture students because they don't have permission to pursue this course now.

reviews.review_heading: University for Punjabis only.
reviews.review_text: Superb infrastructure for sports. I am cutting a star because of the hostel. Hostels are not well-maintained, but otherwise, the grounds and libraries are top class. They provide various facilities to students, such as a gym, pool, etc. Many canteens are not so good, and the mess is very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Golden Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average but good enough for daily classes. Labs had the basic equipment we needed, and Wi-Fi worked most of the time. Classrooms were clean and comfortable. The library was helpful, but it needed more updated books. Hostel rooms were okay, and the food was manageable. Sports and medical facilities were simple but useful when required.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of extra curricular activities like - shooting, swimming, etc.
reviews.review_text: Neat and clean hostel and good infrastructure. Hostel rooms are good and neat and clean. Washrooms are clean. There is also a lift in the hostel. Food in the mess is nice and can be eaten. There are many shops in the hostel where we get all our necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our department is good, and many more departments, such as UBS, Agriculture, and the UIT department, have better infrastructure. Moreover, we have a health centre on our campus which includes great and experienced doctors and helpful staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good Engineering College .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course was extremely good. Wi-Fi was available in the college. Labs were well-equipped with instruments. Library was present in the campus. Hostel was also good it's has water cooler, decent washrooms.

faqs.answer: A:    The total fee for MEd at MGKVP Varanasi is INR 6,380. This fee, however, is been sourced from unofficial websites on the internet. Hence, it can be considered indicative. For the exact fee for MEd, students are advised to visit the official website, check out the admission brochure or visit the admission office of MGKVP in person. In addition to the tuition fee, one of the additional components that the students are required to pay is  the college application fee which is different for different category students. The same for M.Ed ranges between INR 950 - INR 1,050 across different categories. This fee must be paid while filling out the online application form before submission.
faqs.question: How expensive is the MEd programme of MGKVP?

The exact amount depends on the candidates' chosen specialisation/affiliated college. Besides the tuition fee, candidates may be required to submit a one-time fee of INR 17,500. Candidates seeking accomodation at the university must pay the hostel fee separately. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: A:    As per the details available in the brochure and multiple online sources, there is no provision available for direct admissions to the LLB programme at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith Varanasi. Candidates seeking admission to MGKVP Varanasi for LLB, however, are required to appear and apply for the university-level entrance exam. Those who qualify the exam and possess the basic minimum eligibility of having an undergraduate degree get admission to this course.
faqs.question: Can I get into the LLB programme of MGKVP directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The total seat intake for LLB at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi is 60 for regular seats. This intake, however, is for the course available at the campus of MGKVP, the seat intake for different MGKVP-affiliated colleges offering LLB is over and above the 60 seats. To know the college-wise seat intake for LLB, students are advised to visit the official website of different MGKVP-affiliated colleges. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am not absolutely dissatisfied. It's like 50-50.

review_content.Placements: There are not many students who got placed, all of them went for higher studies, and the remaining are recruited by a Private Bank and another company, not as many as other colleges, and there are fewer internships in this college. The role of the B.Com is not good. It is just for function management and other rallies and political events.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not good as shown in the image, and the library is also not good, and the gym is not good, and the video of the gym is also viral for not working equipment, and the Wi-Fi really works, and it is very low speed, mess, and the canteen food is like every canteen food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life of a student at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi.

review_content.Placements: 250 students are placed in my batch. I am doing a B.Sc. in Physics in pure science. Many of the students who will study in this university are working for a top leading company in the world. But percentage is so small. Two or three people out of hundred go into this place. Recently, 23 students at the university have been selected by a software company. I don't know the name of company but you can search on Google.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facility and infrastructure of my university are awesome because you can do anything in the lab without restriction. Faculty members are so helpful and friendly. Library is medium means size of department but books are so huge. I do not live in hostel but hostel life is the best. Some of my friends live in hostel. There is one big ground in university. You can play anything in this ground.

overview_faqs.question: Is MGKVP a good option for LLB?
overview_faqs.answer: One of the verified students’ reviews available for LLB at MGKVP on Shiksha mentions, the faculty members are very good. They are knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. They implement simple and normal methods and the student-to-faculty ratio is 60:1”. While another review mentions, “ Low-end infrastructure with a very poor quality of internet/Wi-Fi, labs are dull, the classrooms are okay but not up to the mark. It is a vintage-style building as it was made in the mid-1900s. So, you can guess the type of infrastructure”. Considering both viewpoints, it can be considered a decent option and also a not-so-decent option for LLB. However, the final decision depends on the aspirant and the factor that is more important to them. Check out more reviews on MGKVP LLB course here.

review_summary.college_name: MGKVP Varanasi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college teachers are good and supportive. I am sad that there is no placement in my college.

content.Placements: Anyone can admit if they have 60 percent marks in their previous school. There are no placement opportunities at my college. Not many companies come to our college. No internship opportunities are provided by the college. Many courses like BA, BCA, etc., are offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility in my college. The computer lab in my college is very good. There are 2 smart rooms where teachers take classes. The hostel of our college is quite good for 2 people. The hostel fees are also low, but the canteen or mess is not provided by the college. The students in the hostel have to cook their own food. There are no medical facilities in our college. In case of an emergency, medical help is called from outside. Sports are held in December.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for students.

content.Placements: Placement chances are good, and the placement percentage is 90 percent. Many companies visit the college for placements. In my course, placements are a bit low because many students prefer to do an MBA after BBA for better placement. The college tries its best for placements of students who are interested.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides the best facilities and infrastructure. It has AC labs with all working computers. The library has all kinds of books and PYQs, which are very important for students. Wi-Fi is also available. In the hostel, facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not absolutely dissatisfied. It's like 50-50.

content.Placements: There are not many students who got placed, all of them went for higher studies, and the remaining are recruited by a Private Bank and another company, not as many as other colleges, and there are fewer internships in this college. The role of the B.Com is not good. It is just for function management and other rallies and political events.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not good as shown in the image, and the library is also not good, and the gym is not good, and the video of the gym is also viral for not working equipment, and the Wi-Fi really works, and it is very low speed, mess, and the canteen food is like every canteen food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life of a student at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi.

content.Placements: 250 students are placed in my batch. I am doing a B.Sc. in Physics in pure science. Many of the students who will study in this university are working for a top leading company in the world. But percentage is so small. Two or three people out of hundred go into this place. Recently, 23 students at the university have been selected by a software company. I don't know the name of company but you can search on Google.
content.Infrastructure: Facility and infrastructure of my university are awesome because you can do anything in the lab without restriction. Faculty members are so helpful and friendly. Library is medium means size of department but books are so huge. I do not live in hostel but hostel life is the best. Some of my friends live in hostel. There is one big ground in university. You can play anything in this ground.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Varanasi.

content.Placements: MGKVP University is good overall. Its placement record is considered average, with the median package for 3-year undergraduate programs at 2.40 LPA and 4-year programs at 5.50 LPA, although placement figures vary by programme, with higher median packages for postgraduate programs. Approximately 70 percent of students were getting placed.
content.Infrastructure: The university has large classrooms, some of which are air-conditioned and well maintained. All types of facilities are available. Hostels are best with facilities of mess, canteen, medical, sports, and games. It has the best playground for playing sports.

eligibility_selection.title: MGKVP Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: MGKVP admission is open for all UG, PG, Diploma, and certificate courses. The duration of most of the MGKVP courses is three years, whereas PG courses are of two-year duration. The university also offers several diploma courses at UG and PG levels. Admission to all the courses is merit and entrance based. To be eligible for admission to UG and PG courses, candidates are required to appear and apply for CUET-UG and CUET-PG exam, respectively. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular MGKVP Varanasi courses: Course

faqs.answer: The total MGKVP Varanasi BA tuition fee ranges between INR 6,200 and INR 1.2 lakh. This amount is payable over a period of three years. The exact amount depends on the candidates' chosen specialisation/affiliated college. Besides the tuition fee, candidates may be required to submit a one-time fee of INR 17,500. Candidates seeking accomodation at the university must pay the hostel fee separately. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the total fee for BA at MGKVP Varanasi?

faqs.answer: MGKVP Varanasi admission to the Ayurvedacharya in Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery course is based on AYUSH. As per cutoff 2022, the closing rank after three rounds of counselling for Ayurvedacharya in Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery closed at 25847 for the General category candidates belonging to All India Quota. For OBC All India, the closing rank was 29278 while for SC All India it was 134490. So, according to the last year cutoff ranks, it can be anticipated that candidates with 30000 rank will get admission in MGKVP.

MGKVP Varanasi fees contain multiple components such as tuition fees, exam fees, application fees, and others. Some of the fees are paid one time while some fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many students don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education more accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. MGKVP Varanasi offers entrance-based admission to candidates in UG and PG courses. The college allots seats based on the last qualifying exam score in diploma courses. The candidates who clear the eligibility criteria set by the college and apply and appear for CUET-UG and CUET-PG will have to pay some amount of fee for final seat allotment. The table containsMGKVP Varanasi seat intakeof all courses:
Course Name
Seat Intake
Step 1: MGKVP Application Process 2026

Admission at MGKVP, the initial step is to fill application form for CUET by visiting website ofNTAand submitting the application form after paying the application fee. Further, for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to fill out the application form by visiting the official website of the university.
Step 2: MGKVP Selection Criteria 2026

Candidates based on valid scores in CUET will be shortlisted for the counselling process at MGKVP and further admission rounds based on the programmes the candidate applied for. Additionaly, to be eligible for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria set by the college.
Step 3: MGKVP Final Seat Allotment 2026

Candidates whose names appeared in the list of selected candidates in any particular programme will be required to report to the admission cell of MGKVP for document verification and fee payment for locking their seats for that specific course.

courses_data.name: MGKVP Varanasi BCA Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:CUET, CBSE 12th, ISC, MPBSE 12th, UP 12th, Maharashtra HSC
courses_data.description: MGKVP Varanasi BCA admission 2026is entrance-based. The university offers BCA at the UG level with a duration of three years. Applicants who want to be admitted to MGKVP must have to score a good aggregate inCUET-UG. However, they must have to fulfill basic eligibility criteria such as qualifying for Class 12 from a recognised board. Checkout below for more information on theMGKVP Varanasi BCA Courses:

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BCA at MGKVP Varanasi?
faqs.answer: MGKVP Varanasi offers entrance-based admission to BCA. To be eligible for admission to BCA, applicants must appear for the CUET- UG exam conducted by NTA. Further candidates must pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Can I do a BCA with 40% in Class 12 at MGKVP Varanasi?
faqs.answer: MGKVP Varanasi doesn’t set any specific percentage criteria for admission to BCA. Candidates are required to appear for the CUET- UG entrance exam. So if any candidates want admission to MGKVP Varanasi for a BCA course they must have Class 10 and Class 12 scoreboard from a recognised board.

faqs.question: What is the average package for Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith MBA?
faqs.answer: The MGKVP MBA placement details are not out yet. However, the overall details for PG (2-year) courses are available in the NIRF report 2024. During 2023 placements,  57 PG (2-year) students were placed out of 1,374 graduates. Earlier, out of 1,417 total students 354 were successfully placed in the 2022 drive. faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in 12th boards. Can I get admission for BCA in MGKVP?
faqs.answer: MGKVP BCA admissions are entrance based. Students looking to apply for programme are required to pass Class 12 with relevant subject from a recognised board. Additionally they need to secure valid score in accepted entrance exam i.e. CUET to get admitted to MGKVP BCA course. In case a students fails to clear the entrance test with a valid score they can explore other options to pursue their preferred course. They can check out other colleges and universities offering offline and online BCA cours

courses_data.name: MGKVP Varanasi BBA Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:CUET, CBSE 12th, ISC, Maharashtra HSC, UP 12th, UPMSP
courses_data.description: MGKVP Varanasi BBAoffers a three-year regular UG degree. The university offersentrance-based admissionto BBA. Candidates must passClass 10andClass 12in any streamfrom a recognised board. Candidates will have to appear inCUET-UG conducted by NTA. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates must apply online for admission. Check below to know more aboutMGKVP Varanasi BBA admission 2026:

faqs.question: Can I direct in BBA at MGKVP Varanasi directly?
faqs.answer: No, MGKVP Varanasi offers entrance-based admission to BBA courses. Candidates must fulfill the eligibility criteria and apply for CUET-UG. After all the procedures the university releases its merit list. If a student is shortlisted based on merit, they must pay the admission fee to secure their seat.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the MGKVP Varanasi for BBA?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith BBA admission is based on the applicants scores in the CUET UG exam and subject to the fulfilment of the preset eligibility criteria. The MGKVP Varanasi BBA eligibility criteria require candidates to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Are BBA admissions open at MGKVP?
faqs.answer: Yes,Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith BBA admission 2025is currently open. The university started accepting BBA applications on April 26,  2026. As per the currently available information, the last date to apply is May 20,  2025. The counselling process is expected to be conducted in July 2025 (tentative). Interested candidates can apply online by visiting the university's official website.

faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in 12th boards. Can I get admission for BBA in MGKVP?
faqs.answer: BBA course admission at MGKVPis entrance-based. Students looking to apply for course must secure a valid score in accepted entrance exam i.e. CUET UG. Additionally basic eligibility requires the candidates to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. The institute will shortlist the candidates based on the entrance exam scores and other parameters. courses_data.description: MGKVP Varanasi offers a regularMaster of Business Administration (MBA)programme approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE, Ministry of Education, Government of India). The university offers the programme in four specialisations. It is a full-time programme of a two-year duration. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to fill out the admission criteria set by the college. Want to know more about MGKVP Varanasi MBA admission 2026, go through the below section:

faqs.question: How can I apply for MBA at MGKVP, Varanasi?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi application process for MBA has started with the registration process of CUET-PG. The first step is to register for the CUET-PG by visiting the official website of the exam.After registration, candidates must fill in the application form and pay the registration fee which is as follows.NOTE:The application fee given here is according to CUET PG. The exam fee will be provided once the application is declared.CategoryApplication Fee (in INR) (For upto three test papers)Application F

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in MBA at MGKVP?
faqs.answer: There is no provision for direct admission to the MBA programme of MGKVP, Varanasi. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme must fulfil the following requirements:The candidate should possess a bachelor’s degree irrespective of the discipline.Candidates must have valid scores in CUET-PG to be eligible to register for the counselling process for MBA at MGKVP, Varanasi.Candidates will have to report to the admission cell at MGKVP on the specified date for document verification and final

faqs.question: What is the total fee for MBA at MGKVP, Varanasi?
faqs.answer: The total MBA fee at MGKVP Varanasi ranges between INR 1.2 Lakh to INR 1.3 lakh. This fee, however, is subject to change. Hence, it must be considered indicative. For the exact MBA, students are advised to visit the official website or the admission office of MGKVP in person. In addition to the programme fee, apsirants have to submit certain one-time charges, such as CUET PG registration fee, examination fees, security deposits, etc.

faqs.question: Is admission to the MBA programme at MGKVP entrance based or merit based?
faqs.answer: The MBA programme at MGKVP is offered at the PG course level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance based admission process to secure their admission to the programme.Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance exams such as CUET PG. Candidates are required to pay the course fee once shortlisted.

faqs.question: What is the last date for MGKVP application form?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith (MGKVP), Varanasi usually concludes the application process between May and July for most of its courses across. Candidates seeking admission must fulfil the eligibility and other requirements for final seat allotment and should fill out the application by paying the required application fee before the specified last date. Those who qualify for all the admission rounds will be required to report to the admission cell at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith (MGKVP), Varanasi for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to MGKVP Varanasi?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the MGKVP course admission must take the CUET exam as Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith (MGKVP), Varanasi accepts admission for the UG and PG programmes based on valid scores in CUET-UG and CUET-PG, respectively. The process for admission to the programmes offered at MGKVP begins with registration for the CUET exam through the official website by paying the required registration fee for final submission. Candidates having valid CUET scores can register for the counselling process at MGKVP followed by document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.

faqs.question: How many courses does MGKVP Varanasi offer?
faqs.answer: MGKVP Varanasi offers more than 20 courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels. It also offers several UG Diploma, PG Diploma, and certificate courses well. The university also has more than 350 affiliated colleges spread over five districts, namely Varanasi, Bhadohi, Chandauli, Mirzapur and Sonbhadra. For NEET cutoff 2022, the closing rank for MBBS stood at 303611 for the General Home State Quota. reviews.review_heading: My college teachers are good and supportive. I am sad that there is no placement in my college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in my college. The computer lab in my college is very good. There are 2 smart rooms where teachers take classes. The hostel of our college is quite good for 2 people. The hostel fees are also low, but the canteen or mess is not provided by the college. The students in the hostel have to cook their own food. There are no medical facilities in our college. In case of an emergency, medical help is called from outside. Sports are held in December.

reviews.review_text: My college provides the best facilities and infrastructure. It has AC labs with all working computers. The library has all kinds of books and PYQs, which are very important for students. Wi-Fi is also available. In the hostel, facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not absolutely dissatisfied. It's like 50-50.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a student at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Facility and infrastructure of my university are awesome because you can do anything in the lab without restriction. Faculty members are so helpful and friendly. Library is medium means size of department but books are so huge. I do not live in hostel but hostel life is the best. Some of my friends live in hostel. There is one big ground in university. You can play anything in this ground.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: The university has large classrooms, some of which are air-conditioned and well maintained. All types of facilities are available. Hostels are best with facilities of mess, canteen, medical, sports, and games. It has the best playground for playing sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Microtek College of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I want to improve the way they provide practical knowledge in greatly way.
reviews.review_text: 60 percent of the students were placed in the course. In my college, packages were above average. Highest salary totally depends on the students. If the performance of students good, they get the highest package. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, etc. Students got internships. Placement and training activities were held on regular basis.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very beautiful and very eco-friendly. Each classroom has too many fans there is no crowd feeling in the class because it is very big hall. Wi-Fi is also available on the campus. Canteens are good, but the taste of the canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good. Infrastructure is best for some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi campus and separate hostels for boys and girls, and there is also a park, sports ground, and stadium for indoor games like badminton. There is also a gym, but the gym isn't that good and isn't working properly. There is a library and a study place where you can study and get books for free.

reviews.review_heading: MGKVP Varanasi review by Ishu.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also good. The library is very great. Hostel facility is good, mess and canteen are also great. This college is amazing overall. Infrastructure of this college is very great, and it is surrounded by nature.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SMS - School of Management Sciences, VaranasiReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college should focus on sports, and the canteen should have more variety!
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure at my college, especially from the outside. I think they should improve more UG buildings, but PG buildings are amazing, like a university. The garden area is amazing, and the library is amazing, but the conference hall should be bigger because it is too small!

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGKVP - Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is amazing. I came here and then I was very impressed because this college has Wi-Fi, the lapse, the class, everything is so great. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hotel facility, but the canteen and medical facilities are great, sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The greatest college of Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is amazing. The case, the department, and all the things are amazing. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library, everything is great. Canteens are great, very hygienic, and have good medical facilities. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, must take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. Good for studies. Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are amazing. I did not opt for a hostel, so I don't know about it. Canteens are amazing, and hygienic sports and games are great. I love this college.

reviews.review_heading: College is so good compared to others.
reviews.review_text: All rooms are Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are clean. Classrooms are highly equipped. I suggest that the upcoming students who are willing to graduate from a well-known university should consider Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapeeth University for their faculty and reputation.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and got A grade by NAAC.
reviews.review_text: In the field of infrastructure, my college is very well in every field whether it is desks, blackboards, smart boards, water facilities, etc. Labs in our college are also well-maintained and have good guidance for the new students. Overall, good in everything.

paragraphs: MGKVP Varanasi offers a three-year BBA at the UG level. The programme is also offered at various MGKVP-affiliated institutes. The fee structure at these institutes vary from one another. MGKVP Varanasi BBA tuition fee across various affiliated institutes ranges between INR 1.2 Lacs and INR 2.4 lakh. As per the latest admission brochure, the BBA fee at the MGKVP is INR 22,000 per annum. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

The total fee for LLB at MGKVP Varanasi is INR 9,570. This fee, however, is been sources from unofficial websites on the internet. Hence, it can be considered indicative. For the exact fee for LLB, students are advised to visit the official website, check out the admission brochure or visit the admission office of MGKVP in-person. The application fee for LLB is as follows:

DISCLAIMER: The application fee mentioned in the above table is for UG courses since there is no information on the LLB application in the 2022-23 admission brochure. Refer to the official brochure available in the above table for more details.

One of the additional components that the students are required to pay other than the tuition fee while taking admission is the college application fee which is different for different category students. The same for M.Ed ranges between INR 950 - INR 1,050 across different categories. This fee must be paid while filling out the online application form before submission. Those candidates who wish to apply for two or more courses are given a 50% discount on every additional application filled after the first course onward. In addition to filling out the online application, students also have the option to submit the application fee and then download the application form. The same can then be filled and submitted offline.

The total fee for MEd at MGKVP Varanasi is INR 6,380. This fee, however, is been sourced from unofficial websites on the internet. Hence, it can be considered indicative. For the exact fee for MEd, students are advised to visit the official website, check out the admission brochure or visit the admission office of MGKVP in person. In addition to the tuition fee, one of the additional components that the students are required to pay is  the college application fee which is different for different category students. The same for M.Ed ranges between INR 950 - INR 1,050 across different categories. This fee must be paid while filling out the online application form before submission.

admission_overview.college_name: NIFD Global Indore Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Fees & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: NIFD Global Indore opens pathways to diverse opportunities in Fashion Design and Interior Design. The full-time BDes course at NIFD Global Indore is certified by theInternational Accreditation Organisation (IAO)and is offered by the departments of interior design and fashion design. Merit is the main criterion for admission toNIFD Global Indore. The fundamental need for enrollment in NIFD Global Indore's foundation course is passing the class 12 exam. It's interesting to note that 75% of NIFD Global Indore students can secure internships at prestigious businesses.

For NIFD Global Indore admissions to various UG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to NIFD Global Indore course admissions 2025:
NIFD admissions 2025 is both merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around NIFD admissions 2025:
Step 1: Application Procedure

Commencing the admission process for NIFD Global Indore in 2025, candidates need to initiate the application process. The application form can be downloaded from the institute's official website. After filling out the form, applicants are required to submit it either via post or in person at the designated department. While the application and entrance test fees are paid online, candidates must attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan to the application form.
Step 2: Eligibility Assessment & Selection Rounds

Admission to NIFD Global Indore is primarily based on merit. Candidates must meet the minimum eligibility criteria specified for each course. For instance, for the BBA and BDes courses, applicants need to have completed Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 60%. The selection process is entirely merit-based.
Step 3: Merit List Publication & Counselling

Upon the completion of all selection rounds, NIFD Global Indore will publish the merit list comprising the names of selected candidates. Subsequently, candidates must participate in the counselling process for their respective courses. Once selected, students need to pay the requisite fees to secure their seat at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has a friendly environment. We have a canteen. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Our college has a sports arena for special Indore sports activities. They organise sports meet every year. Our college provides the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The styling course is worth it here if you live in Indore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Although the campus area is not too large. Essentially it's only 2 floors and a ground floor with a terrace being the cafeteria and auditorium. But everything is very clean, and the whole campus has AC. The classrooms are also good and fully equipped according to subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good option for students living in Indore or nearby cities.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a hostel but has many hostels nearby, one of which the college has collaborated with and has decent pricing and good accommodation. Facilities and infrastructure are top-notch. It is the best in Indore. The whole campus is very clean and hygienic and is fully air-conditioned with different types of classrooms assigned for different practical subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely worth it, and you'll experience the best college life ever.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is actually good. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the campus is very good. You can chill in the massive area occupied by the cafeteria. Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, material library, computer labs, and a creative zone where students can sit and be creative. Lift facilities are available for every floor. Proper parking facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very best for fashion and interior design. I am highly satisfied with this course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, laboratories, canteen, and air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. The classroom is very clean. Wi-Fi is also working properly and fast network. The library is full of interesting books and different types of creative items. Laboratories have an advanced system to increase efficiency. The classroom is also fully well furnished.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned, and studios are a good workplace for students, which fosters creativity. Labs and studios are well-furnished and equipped with the latest audio-visual equipment. Labs have advanced systems in order to increase efficiency.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college. ( Dream college).
reviews.review_text: We got separate libraries for fashion and interior both, Wi-Fi, classrooms, contraction lab, auditorium, canteen, lift, computer lab, display area, creative zone, parking etc. Canteen food is absolute best quality and very delicious. We can stay extra and work in our creative zone and our institute is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Learning design excellence in INIFD
reviews.review_text: The 4-floored INIFD campus is an exemplary one. It is huge and housed with modern technologies. The theatre-style labs and classrooms are something which make learning more interesting. The amazing canteen area and basketball court are the main attractions.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus has a good infrastructure, and there is a good crowd of students and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, labs, canteen and air-conditioned classrooms are available here. Our college provides a London workshop and conducts every type of activity. The campus infrastructure is also very nice. The environment is nice here. Every type of facility related to studies, technology, fun, etc., are provided here. There is a canteen on the campus.

Courses offered are four years of BDes, two years MA in Design, a Junior Diploma in Design, an Executive Diploma in Design, a Professional Diploma in Design for a duration of 1 year/ 2 years/ 3 years
BDes is offered with the following specialisations:
Students must have passed class 12 with 50% minimum score from a recognised board.
MA in Design is offered with the following specialisations:
Bachelor's degree holders with 50% marks in any stream from a recognised university are eligible.
Junior Diploma, Executive Diploma and Professional Diploma in Design
Eligibility: Class 12 pass with 50% score from a recognised board. Graduation degree with 50% marks in any stream from a recognised university for the PG Diploma programme.

faqs.answer: Apeejay Institute of Design also known as AID, was establishaed in 1991. The institute is approved by AICTE. The institute is located in Tugalaqabad. The institute was the first one to introduce a BDes degree course in 1998. The institute today offers courses in the stream of Fashion, Interior and Graphic Design, animation, and multimedia.AID has various International collaborations. AID has been awarded as Best Design Institute for Nurturing Innovation and Design Thinking by the Federation of World Academics, in 2021.

This suggests the worthiness of pursuing BDes course from AID.

admission_process.title: Apeejay Institute of Design Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Apeejay Institute of Design admissionsare offered on both merit and entrance basis.Apeejay Institute of Designis a constituent ofApeejay Satya University. It offers degree and diploma programmes at UG and PG levels across various disciplines of Design.Apeejay Institute of Design admission is openforBachelor of Design (BDes)in Graphics Design/ Applied Arts, Fashion Design, and Interior Design.

Apeejay Institute of Design offers quality education in full-time mode. The institute offers undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma-level programmes. Explore the highlights below to learn more about Apeejay Institute of Design admission:
Particulars
Admission Highlights 2026
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.
The Institute offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Design. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for the offered course at Apeejay Institute of Design:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 from a recognised board with 50% aggregate from any stream
Aptitude Test + Interview
Graduation with 50% aggregate from any stream from a recognised university
UG DiplomaIDC
Graduation with 50% aggregate from any stream from a recognised university
PG DiplomaPDD
Graduation with 50% aggregate from any stream from a recognised university

Apeejay Institute of Design admission will be done through the Aptitude Test and Interview. The admission procedure includes various stages such as application, entrance tests, interview rounds and paying the required fee. Interested candidates are advised to check the eligibility criteria before applying to the institute. Find the admission process for Apeejay Institute of Design courses:
Step 1: Application Process

For online registrations, eligible candidates need to download the admission form, fill in, scan the filled admission form and mail it to (aid.del@apj.edu)or may be printed and couriered to the institution directly. A registration fee of INR 900 has to be paid in Cheque/ Demand Draft in favour of“APEEJAY INSTITUTE OF DESIGN”payable at New Delhi and may also be directly sent to the institution with the form or separately
Step 2: Aptitude Test and Interview

After the application process, Candidates will be called for the aptitude test and Interview. For the UG courses, candidates will have to appear for the Aptitude test and Interview. However, for the PG courses, candidates are required to appear only for the Interview.

courses_data.name: Apeejay Institute of Design BDes Admission 2026
courses_data.description: The institute offers BDes for four years. Aandidates are required to appear for an aptitude test conducted by the institute, followed by a PI round for admission. Aspirants must have passed Class 12 in any stream with a minimum aggregate of 50% to apply for admission. Following are the four specialisations offered in Apeejay Institute of Design BDes programme:

faqs.question: Are Admission dates out for BDes at Apeeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: As per the Apeeejay Institute of Design's official website, Admssion 2025 is open for all the UG and PG courses. Candidates are required to visit the official website and register. For the BDes programme, candidates are required to appear for the Aptitude test, followed by Interview.

courses_data.name: Apeejay Institute of Design MA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Admission to the two-year Master of Arts (MA) in Design programme is conducted through a Personal Interview (PI) round. Aspirants, who have completed their graduation degree (any stream) with a minimum 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for this programme. There are four areas of interest offered in MA Design and these are: For admission to the PDD programme, candidates are required to qualify for a Personal Interview PI round. A pass in a graduation degree from any stream, with a minimum aggregate of 45%, is considered to be eligible for admission to PDD. The institute offers the following 10 specialisations under this programme: Read on to learn more about Apeejay Institute of Design MA admission.

faqs.question: Are Admission dates out for MA at Apeeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: As per the Apeeejay Institute of Design's official website, Admssion 2024 is open for all the UG and PG courses. Candidates are required to visit the official website and register.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to the Apeejay Institute of Design MA programme?
faqs.answer: Admission to the Apeejay Institute of Design MA programme is based on the interview. The institution also offers lateral entry mode in accordance with UGC’s Choice Based Credit System.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MA at Apeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: The eligibility for MA at Apeejay Institute of Design is to have abachelor’s degree with 50% aggregatein any stream from any RecogniSed University. The Institution offers MA for a duration of two years in four specialisations, including Graphic Design, Fashion Design, Interior Design, and Animation & Multimedia. MA selection is done entirely on the  Interview.Admission 2024 is open,Candidates can visit the official website to apply

faqs.question: Is apeejay a good college?
faqs.answer: Apeejay Institute of Design also known as AID, was establishaed in 1991. The institute is approved by AICTE. The institute is located in Tugalaqabad. The institute was the first one to introduce a BDes degree course in 1998. The institute today offers courses in the stream of Fashion, Interior and Graphic Design, animation, and multimedia.AID has various International collaborations. AID has been awarded as Best Design Institute for Nurturing Innovation and Design Thinking by the Federation of World Academics, in 2021.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Des at Apeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for Apeejay Institute of Design BDes course is 60 for each specilisation. The institute offers BDes in seven different specialisations. Hence, the total seat intake is 420 for BDes at Apeejay Institute of Design .

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Des at Apeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: .Apeejay Institute of Design typically accepts scores from theApeejay Entrance Test (AET)for admission to the Bachelor of Design (B. Des) program. The AET is an entrance examination conducted by the institute to assess the aptitude and creative skills of aspiring design students.Admission to the BDes course is subject to a valid score in the Aptitude test and Interview. Candidates are required fill the application form for admission to the BDes course. However, candidates first need to qualify for the eligibility criteria.Eligibility:Twelve years of school education with 50% aggregate.Selection:Aptitude Test and Interview

placement_report.college_name: Apeejay Institute of Design Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Apeejay Institute of Design Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Apeejay Institute of Design placement report 2023 is not released. However, according to students’ online reviews, the starting package offered during Apeejay Institute of Design placements in recent past stood at INR 2.4 LPA . Further, Apeejay Institute of Design offers 100% placement assistance to its students. The top recruiters during Apeejay Institute of Design placements in recent past included Cosmopolitan India, Yashraj Films and Shoppers Stop.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for B.Des students at Apeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: Rs.5,00,000 (per month) is the highest package for B.Des students at Apeejay Institute of Design. The top companies visiting the campus are Cosmopolitan India, Yashraj Films and Shoppers Stop. The starting package stood at Rs 2.4 Lakh.

faqs.question: How are B.Des placements at Apeejay Institute of Design?
faqs.answer: The placements for B. Des (bachelor of design) at Apeejay Institute of Design - [AID], New Delhi is really very good. It one of the top five colleges in India in design field. Placements and job opportunities are good in the college. The institute offers 100% placement assurance. Companies like marks and Spencer, Madamme, tommy hilfiger etc. recruit students from the campus. The only thing what matters is the students portfolio i.e., The capability of the student. So we can conclude that this college good at placements

faqs.question: Does AID have any collaborations?
faqs.answer: Yes, Apeejay Institute of Design in collaboration with Arts University Bournemouth offers a programme, under which students have to study for two years at AID and for the rest two at AUB. The programme will offer students a degree from AUB and they also get to spend two fewer years abroad.

hostel_campus.college_name: Apeejay Institute of Design Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Apeejay Institute of Design is a perfect place for any aspiring designer to learn.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes well-equipped labs, library, and respective classrooms with different equipment as per the department and their needs.

reviews.review_heading: How my college life went.
reviews.review_text: There are not many facilities provided; you cannot bring your laptops to the college, and there is no Wi-Fi for students. There is a library, but you won't be able to access it because they kick you out as soon as college ends. There is a canteen inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: It was a great learning experience.
reviews.review_text: If you love nature then this is the place to be. It cant get any better studying amidst of nature. Flower pots and greenery all around. They have well equipped and airconditioned computer labs, classrooms with projector. In gist I would say the campus is small but a fun place to be in.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, great atmosphere, good location and fine company.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms, design labs, and studios have all the equipment you need. The library is full of yesteryear's thesis and study material. The canteen food is good. Infrastructure has been recently renovated and is a good place to expose oneself to whatever interests you. Wi-Fi facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, helpful facilities and staff, and a calm environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is normal. I like the environment of our campus, which is calm and silent, and easy to work in. We have facilities of labs, Wi-Fi, hygienic and clean washrooms, hygienic canteen and stationery. Medical facilities are available in our college.

At the UG level, the college offers four-year BDes and five-year B.Arch courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MDes, MA, and M.Arch courses to students. The college also provides certificate courses to students. faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fee structure followed at MPAS for BDes course is a per annum model. The total tuition fee for BDes course at MPAS BDes is INR 7.2 lakh. Each instalment of BDes course fees is INR 1.8 Lacs in 2025. Candidates who are unsure about the admission fee payable for the BDes course are advised to contact the college officials.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Interior Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, no AC classrooms and some great faculty members every semester.

review_content.Placements: I'm not sure about the recruiting as a second-year student. They do mention a lot of placements and internship chances on their website and in their marketing campaigns. But I am not quite sure about this. As a first-year student, they had asked us to go for a summer internship of our choice and submit the necessary documents afterwards to prove the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is, in fact, great but it takes a lot of time to adhere to the path and accesses. The feeling intends to get higher every year. However, there is no AC facility in any of the classrooms except for the CAD labs. It is hard to survive during the summer.

review_summary.college_name: Manipal School of Architecture and Planning Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It has good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: MSAP placements are existent but limited. It is offered to only the best students of the batch for the Bachelor of Architecture. It has a very active aluminium community that recruits students on behalf of their firms. Out of the selective group of students, a fair number of students do get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch with smartboards for education, highly equipped printing labs, 3d printing labs, VR labs, a library with all the books we need, auditoriums, work studios, a building materials lab, survey labs, good Wi-Fi, and classrooms with plenty of light, air, and charging points. Hostels are well-maintained and standard. There are both AC and non-AC rooms with attached and non-attached bathrooms, from single to triple sharing for female and male, with Wi-Fi. There are staff members for cleaning and laundry services. There are 4-5 types of mess facilities, and we can sign up for them with good, tasty, and hygienic food. Medical facilities are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Manipal - The student town.

content.Placements: My course is bachelors as well as masters, and good firms send in applications for placements. Student experience during their internship, and mostly get placed depending on their CGPA. Mostly firms are from Bangalore, Hyderabad, and other cities too.
content.Infrastructure: We have our own campus designed in a way that considers student and staff. College has an amazing view. There is a lot of open space within campus. Even classes are well designed, keeping in mind sustainability. We do have labs, Wi-Fi, and printing area for our preparations as well as allotted classes course-wise. Library is also there. We do have canteen and faculty lounge for girls on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, no AC classrooms and some great faculty members every semester.

content.Placements: I'm not sure about the recruiting as a second-year student. They do mention a lot of placements and internship chances on their website and in their marketing campaigns. But I am not quite sure about this. As a first-year student, they had asked us to go for a summer internship of our choice and submit the necessary documents afterwards to prove the same.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is, in fact, great but it takes a lot of time to adhere to the path and accesses. The feeling intends to get higher every year. However, there is no AC facility in any of the classrooms except for the CAD labs. It is hard to survive during the summer.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members, average infrastructure, and excellent crowd and campus life.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students are placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like L&T, Studio Mumbai, Sanjay Puri Architects, Studio Lotus, etc., visit our campus. Almost 70% of students got internships. Internships completely depend on your personal skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not up to the mark. Air-conditioners are not available in classrooms and drafting tables are very old. The hostel is good and well-furnished. Both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms are available. Hot water and internet are available. Mess food is also very good. Both north Indian and south Indian food are available. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food are available. There are midnight canteens available in every hostel which are open till midnight.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: College life at this college is very good.

content.Placements: The architecture course doesn't have any placements, so you must search for placements on your own. The training and placement cell might help. Batchmates got placed in various firms all over the country. Depending on performance, few students who joined as interns continued as junior architects.
content.Infrastructure: We share the same hostels with multiple colleges on the MIT campus, but all hostels are well-constructed. They are lively, and there are several student centres. The college is currently a part of the engineering department's building, but it will be soon shifted to its dedicated building.

admission_process.title: Manipal School of Architecture & Planning Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Manipal School of Architecture and Planning admissions are currently open for various courses. The institute offers programmes in Urban Design, Interior Design, Fashion Design & Management and Sustainable Design at theUG, PG and certificate levels. Manipal School of Architecture and Planning admission is bothmerit and entrance-based.

The admission form is available on the official website ofManipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE). Candidates can register for their desired programme by paying an application fee of INR on an online portal of MAHE. Read on to know more aboutManipal School of Architecture and Planningadmission 2025.
Manipal 2025 Applications Open|Apply Now

Manipal School of Architecture & Planningadmissions2025 are open for MDes/M.Archcourses.The college accepts scores of college-level and national-level entrance exams, such as NATA. For a few courses, however, admission is subject to scores obtained by the candidates in the previous qualifying exam. Candidates interested for admission to MSAP can check out the top highlights related to the admission process ofManipal School of Architecture and Planning coursesin the following section:
Particulars

MSAP admission process is conducted in online mode. The school offers BDes, BArch, MArch and MDes programmes at the UG and PG levels. It also offers a certificate programme and the provision of lateral entry to BDes. An overview ofMASP eligibility & selection criteria for admission 2025is as follows:

Manipal School of Architecture and Planning fees may include various components, such as Tuition Fees, Application Fees, Caution Fees (Refundable), etc. Applicants have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission and some amount have to pay while filling entrance exam form. MSAP offers PG and UG courses. MSAP seats vary for course to courses.The school offers highest seat intake inBArch i.e 160. The below table mentions the fees and seat intake for variousUG & PG courses at Manipal School of Architecture and Planning:
Tuition Fees

Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Manipal School of Architecture & Planning admission process 2025 is bothentrance and merit based. Candidates seeking admission to MSAP must qualify for the respective entrance exams and other selection rounds including applying online on the official website ofManipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE).Checkout the following steps for a detailedManipal School of Architecture & Planning admission process 2025:
Step 1: MSAP College Application Process 2025

Candidates willing to take admission to various courses at Manipal School of Architecture & Planning must submit an online application form along with aregistration fee ofINR 600. The application will not be accepted by the college without submitting the necessary documents.
Step 2: MSAP Selection Round

As part of the selection process, candidates must qualify the college/ national-level entrance exam basis the course-level eligibility set by the institute and selection to some courses is merit-based. The selection criteria vary from one courses to another, for instance,BArchapplicants are required to appear forNATAto get admission, however, forBDes, the college conducts its own HomeBased Test (HBT). Similarly, forM.ArchandMDes, students are required tosubmit an SOP and POW. This selection criteria is in addition to the basic minimum eligibility that aspirants must furnish. After the selection rounds are over, the school releases a list of shortlisted students based on their eligibility fulfilment and scores in the selection rounds.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment
MSAP releases a merit list of selected candidates for final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates in the MSAP released list must makecourse fee paymentwithin the given dates to lock their seats.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Manipal School of Architecture and Planning?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Manipal School of Architecture and Planning, Applicants can apply through the official website of the Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE). The college offers both merit and entrance based admission depending on the course selection criteria. Some courses accept scores of different entrance exams. However, there are a few courses that offer direct admission to the students, such as BDes (Lateral Entry). If candidates want to be admitted to BArch, they must score well in the NATA entrance exam, Similarly, candidates must apply, appear and qualify the HBT conducted by MSAP for admission to BDes course. These entrance exams vary from course to course respectively.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Manipal School of Architecture and Planning?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for Manipal School of Architecture and Planning (MSAP) vary from one course to another. To be eligible for a UG course, a candidate must have completed Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. For PG courses, however, students must have completed their undergraduate degree with at least 50% aggregate. faqs.question: Does Manipal School of Architecture and Planning accept ISC score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal School of Architecture and Planning (MSAP) accepts ISC scores for admission to its B.Arch and B.Des courses. The candidates must have passed Class 12 and Class 10 or equivalent examinations with Mathematics as a compulsory subject with minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. The candidates must also qualify for NATA) for B.Arch and Home Based Test followed by PI for B.Des. The candidates can apply online through the official website of Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) before the last date of application.

faqs.question: Is MSAP BDes entrance tough?
faqs.answer: The MSAP BDes entrance exam is the Manipal entrance test or MET for short. According to the student reviews, the difficulty of MET exam is on the easy-medium difficulty where it is easier to crack in comparison to state level entrance exams such as JEE or COMEDK. However, the students describe the test to still be tough and cracking it will require proper preparation.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. It has good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch with smartboards for education, highly equipped printing labs, 3d printing labs, VR labs, a library with all the books we need, auditoriums, work studios, a building materials lab, survey labs, good Wi-Fi, and classrooms with plenty of light, air, and charging points. Hostels are well-maintained and standard. There are both AC and non-AC rooms with attached and non-attached bathrooms, from single to triple sharing for female and male, with Wi-Fi. There are staff m...

reviews.review_heading: Manipal - The student town.
reviews.review_text: We have our own campus designed in a way that considers student and staff. College has an amazing view. There is a lot of open space within campus. Even classes are well designed, keeping in mind sustainability. We do have labs, Wi-Fi, and printing area for our preparations as well as allotted classes course-wise. Library is also there. We do have canteen and faculty lounge for girls on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, no AC classrooms and some great faculty members every semester.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is, in fact, great but it takes a lot of time to adhere to the path and accesses. The feeling intends to get higher every year. However, there is no AC facility in any of the classrooms except for the CAD labs. It is hard to survive during the summer.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members, average infrastructure, and excellent crowd and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark. Air-conditioners are not available in classrooms and drafting tables are very old. The hostel is good and well-furnished. Both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms are available. Hot water and internet are available. Mess food is also very good. Both north Indian and south Indian food are available. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food are available. There are midnight canteens available in every hostel which are open till midnight.

reviews.review_heading: College life at this college is very good.
reviews.review_text: We share the same hostels with multiple colleges on the MIT campus, but all hostels are well-constructed. They are lively, and there are several student centres. The college is currently a part of the engineering department's building, but it will be soon shifted to its dedicated building.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. They are going to shift to another building after a few years. Hostels are very spacious and have all the facilities required, and hygienic food is served in the mess. The campus also has some public gathering places to enjoy nature.

reviews.review_heading: You have the key, do whatever you want with that.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are 10m x 10m in size with a height of up to 7m. These working studios are large enough to offer convenient working spaces for every individual. Apart from that, there are AC seminar halls, jury halls and material laboratories. The architecture department is spacious enough to cater to every student's experimentation, and there are no restrictions as such. The whole building is a canvas to students.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, satisfying teaching quality!
reviews.review_text: You get good quality drafting tables and good audio-visual systems in classrooms. Classes are big enough to accommodate 40 students (4 sections consisting 40 each). The only thing missing in classrooms are ACs, but its easy to get used to it as the rooms are comfortable enough. You get cold water facilities right next to the classrooms. Talking in a larger scale, Manipal has a great library right next to the architecture block, good sports facilities inside the campus and an excellent sports are...

reviews.review_heading: University with  a great infrastructure and learned faculty.
reviews.review_text: All the colleges of Manipal University have a great infrastructure. The studios are huge and well-lit, with each student having their own A0 - A1 size desk. The seminar halls are air-conditioned and have new seats. The bathrooms are close by and well-maintained. The recently renovated CAD lab has around 40 computers with 6 plotters for printing the bigger AO-A1 sheets. The college and hostel WiFi is good with each student getting 30GB data each month. Marena, a world class sporting facility, is ...

A beautiful place surrounded by a peaceful environment beaches around.

college_info.intro:
MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Bangalore comprises of more than 50 departmnets including Engineering & Technology, Dental Science, Managemnet & Commerce, Life & Allied Health Science, Arts & Design, Nursing, and others. BTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the institute.
Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech specilisation in Aerospace Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automotive Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Robotics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Ramaiah University Bangalore is a two year programme. Below mentioned are the MSRUAS popular programmes:

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Automotive Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.
