review_summary.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(Dec 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Around 5-6 students enrolled in the year I took admission. Next year, there were 11-12 students who took admission. There are no placement opportunities or internships provided by our college, which is a huge satisfaction, given that we pay so many fees. There are no recruiting companies that come for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournaments and club activities that keep happening from time to time. The infrastructure and teaching quality are too good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: We are still in our first year and are the followers of the pilot batch. We have heard companies such as AB and GE have come to place, and a few other industries located in Peenya, with packages of 2.5 to 5 LPA. ABB and GE are a few companies that have selected our seniors. We are still in our first year, so we have just heard it from our seniors. A few companies are giving a stipend of 8000.
content.Infrastructure: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automotive Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.

content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.
content.Infrastructure: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computational Social Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: A lot of roles are offered in very high-verified job sites, like the companies TCS, Infosys, IBM, Amazon, and also Google, with an average salary package depending on the department, but in a range of 4-7 LPA, with the highest domestic package reaching up to 52 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

admission_overview.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are open. Ramaiah University offers UG & PG courses in the stream of Science, Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Humanities, etc. For the majority of courses, students are required to appear for RUAS AT, which is the MS Ramaiah entrance exam. The university in addition to conducting its own entrance test, accepts state-level entrance exams such as PGCET, KCET, COMEDK, etc as well. For admission to BVoc course, MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers merit-based admission. Seats at the university are offered through a common counselling process to all the UG & PG courses. More details around Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences course admissions are elaborated below.

The university offers popular courses such as BTech, MBA, BBA, BDes, BVoc, etc. at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels across various specialisations. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the programme. An overview of course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for popular MSRUAS course admissions are given below:

admission_process.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MSRUAS admission processconsists of multiple steps. It includes applying online to RUASAT for entrance-based admission or registering for direct admission. More details aroundM.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission processare as follows:
Application Process

MSRUAS application process is conducted in online mode. Candidates can apply on the official website for their desired programme. An application fee of INR 2000 needs to be paid through online gateway.
Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on entrance exams for all of the courses except for the BVoc programme. The university conducts RUAS-AT for admission to the remaining programmes. Alternatively, valid scores of other national-level exams including CUET/ NEET/ JEE or state-level exams - KCET/ COMEDK are also accepted,
Counselling Process & Document Verification

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates are offered seats through common counselling process. Candidates who get selected must download and fill an admission form on the university's official website. After filling the form, candidates need to pay a tuition fee and submit documents at the university for the verification.

MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fee structuremay include components such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, etc. Some elements are to be paid only once, while the remaining are charged yearly or semesterly. The fee range includes multiple specialisations. The seat intake may change every academic year. Students can check the table below to know about the intake andMS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences feesfor some of the popular courses:
Note: This data is from official sources and can change.

courses_data.description: MSRUAS offers a full-timeMBAprogramme at Gnanagangothri Campus. There are nine specialisations available for this programme. Admission to this course is entrance-based. faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a two-year MBA course at Ramaiah University is INR 8 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at MSRUAS?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences (MSRUAS) is 240. The programme is offered in 9 specializations and has a duration of 2 years. Candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% marks and must appear and qualify the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET) for admission. The university also considers scores of other national-level entrance exams for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to MBA course, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. MS Ramaiah accepts a valid score of PGCET exam, which is a state-level entrance exam, conducted by KEA. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to PG courses.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations does MS Ramaiah University offer?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University offers admission to MBA through the Department of Management Studies. This course is offered across nine specialisations. These are Marketing Management, Human Resource Management, Operations Management, Financial Management, Small Business and Entrepreneurship, Banking and Financial Services, etc.

faqs.question: What is fee structure of BTech at M.S. Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a four-year BTech course at Ramaiah University ranges from INR 7.2 Lacs - INR 21 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat in BTech course at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech or BTech (Lateral Entry) course at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step is to either qualify for the university's in-house entrance exam RUASAT or state-level entrance exams such as KCET/ COMED K with a valid score. The selected candidates are given seats based in the respective counselling session.

faqs.question: Who are eligible for BTech at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to BTech at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfil minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass Class 12 with 45% with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory courses along with Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Electronics or Computer science. Students who belong to reserved category are required to get 40% aggregate in the same. The eligibility criteria for BTech (Lateral Entry) is also the same.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, for admission to BTech and BTech (Lateral Entry) courses, MS Ramaiah conducts in-house entrance exams, i.e., RUASAT. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to its UG courses. Students can get admisison to BTech after qualifying for this exam. Those who are willing to get admission through this exam, need to apply for this exam on the official website of MSURAS by paying an application amount of INR 1,250.

faqs.question: Does MSRUAS accept KCET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, KCET exam is accepted by MSRUAS for admission to BTech programme. Along with that, candidates can also secure admission based on a valid JEE Main exam. Candidates applying for admission within a valid KCET rank of 5,000 are offered a scholarship of INR 30,000.

faqs.question: What is the Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: The Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025 was released for all categories and rounds. The COMEDK Cutoff 2025 ranged from39103to109381as per the last round closing ranks for the General AI category. The COMEDK cutoff is applicable for admissions to various BTech specialisation atM.S Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Ramaiah University Bangalore without CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, students seeking MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission can apply for their preferred courses without the need for appearing for the NTA CUET exam. Students can apply on the basis of the RUASAT test conducted by the university itself for the majority of courses. Further, the university also accepts scoring from other entrance tests such as COMEDK UGET, Uni-GAUGE, KCET, Karnataka PGCET, GATE, among others.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for admissions?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates who want to apply for the UG/ PG courses are required to appear for RUASAT. Moreover, the candidates who want a Ph.D. course admissions must appear for RUASAT followed by a presentation round. Moreover, courses like B.Tech, BDS and MS accept national-level entrance scores like JEE, KCET COMEDK, and NEET respectively.

Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences accepts NEET scores for the admission to Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) and Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) courses. nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 12 ranks to #56 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fell 6 ranks to #22 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournamen...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.
reviews.review_text: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was well-equipped with all major facilities such as Wi-Fi, showers, etc. Shared rooms were available (2 in 1 room). Each room had a chair and study table for each student, along with separate cupboards. The fees were  Rs.45,000 per year, and the mess fees were around Rs.4,000 a month. The food quality was a total disaster. My advice would be to take a flat outside the campus and have good food. University hostel facilities in both the Peenya campus and the Gangotri campus had good roo...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels provided single and shared rooms, with prices ranging from Rs.35,000 to Rs.60,000 per room, including electricity charges. Food was not included.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were good as my friend resides in the hostel. I used to go to his room in my free time. Room was shared as 2 students were residing in a room. There were separate things for both students in a room like a wardrobe, bed, table, and 2 chairs. College had PG named 555-PG. Mess fee was Rs 4,000 for every month which included breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: It's good as it has a hostel inside the college with all live home facilities where it's been provided with a gym, yoga, sports room, club room, and party room. Each room is provided with a self-system for the students living for their usage, food is good and they provide to your room 3 times a day. This course is meant for me to join the top companies in which the Ramaiah has been liked with that companies and they are giving very good facilities to the students. My dream is to become a very go...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 13 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has an environment to find minded people and grow with part of difficulties and blockades.
reviews.review_text: We have special rooms for boys and girls known as a sac with an in-built gym and other board games as well. There is a ground for football, cricket, and indoor courts as well. The hostel is average with okay food. It has a 3-star hostel. Timings are preferred for students.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements yet by the college, but it's a great experience to learn the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with classrooms, places to eat, and good sanitation practices. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms have interactive boards to help us with our academics and course understanding. There is a huge park, wide corridors, a huge food street, and good parking facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by M S Ramaiah Medical CollegeReviewed on 24 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Future leaders from MS Ramaiah Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is present within the MS Ramaiah Medical Hospital. There are 1300+ special beds available for explaining practical cases to students. The campus area is expansive and broad, and it is quite peaceful, amazing, and relaxing.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of Ramaih College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the main highlight of the college. The campus is vast comprising 13 different faculty members like engineering, medical, dental, etc. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, labs are equipped with all the necessary instruments and chemicals. Classes are high-teach comprising smartboard speakers, and comfortable seats for individual students. The library is on the third floor where all the required books are available we can get them for 3 or 15 days. The hostel i...

reviews.review_heading: A college that everyone should check out. It has a really good faculty and a big, beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities wise, it is really great. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and each table has separate charging ports for laptops or mobile phones. There are projectors, speakers, and more. The campus has a vast library, places to relax, an indoor sports complex, and other amenities. The quality of the hostel is good, and more hostels are being built. The food is also good and of high quality.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good overall.
reviews.review_text: We have one lab but 2-3 batches have lab classes at the same time. We have to find some other classrooms which are empty for the lab. The hostel is too bad. The food is not bad and many get food poisoning. Water is also not good and it is not purified. The bathing water is in yellow or brown colors a few times.

college_info.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences provides two types of scholarships. Students can choose to apply for an Admission Test Scholarship or a Merit Scholarship. It is to note that Merit Scholarship can either be a Scholarship of Excellence or a Scholarship of Distinction. Besides, students can avail loans, government and non-government scholarships.  In an academic year, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences students are eligible for only one Admission Test or Merit Scholarship.
MSRUAS Scholarship Key Points
DFP-Banner

The university has set different criteria for university scholarships, which are Merit Scholarships and Admission Test Scholarships. The Merit and Admission Test scholarships with respect to details such as scholarship amount, scholarship criteria and applicable courses are explained below in detail:

The Merit Scholarship is one of the university scholarships that are offered by Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences. In this scholarship, students can choose to apply for a Scholarship of Distinction or a Scholarship of Excellence.
The courses covered under this scholarship along with other details such as scholarship amount and criteria are presented in the below-mentioned table:

admission_overview.college_name: Satyam Fashion Institute Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Process

paragraphs: Satyam Fashion Institute admissionisentrance-based. The institute offers BDes, MDes and PG Diploma in Fashion Design in full-time mode. The institute conducts a Common Entrance Test to shortlist applicants. The admission process for the institute commences online via the official website of the institute. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process forSatyam Fashion Institute.

Satyam Fashion Institute course admissionis entrance-based. Students seeking to get into the UG course need to pass Class 12, whereas PG admissions require students to pass graduation. Candidates need to clear both the eligibility and selection criteria to be eligible for admission. The institute conducts CET which comprises of Creative Ability Test, General Ability Test, Situation Test, and PI. Aspirants can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forSatyam Fashion Institute courses:

The admission procedure for Satyam Fashion Institute involves several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. The process can be completed either online or offline. Aspirants can check out the steps explained below to complete theSatyam Fashion Institute admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
Students can either apply online or offline as per their preference. To complete the process, students need to pay the application fee through the accepted payment mode.
Step 2: Selection Process

To shortlist the students, the institute considers several parameters, such as academic merit in the last qualifying exam, Common Entrance Test score, PI performance, etc. Further, the institute also reserves a certain amount of seats under the management quota.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Students need to go through document verification and pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the institute.

placement_data.title: Satyam Fashion Institute Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Satyam Fashion Institute has earned its name in the Fashion Industry by grooming its students and turning them into skilled Design and Fashion professionals . The Institute has maintained strong relationship with the industry across each domain. This helps students to interact with the respective industries in the form of design collection, graduation projects, internships and live projects .

The overall highest and average package offered to Satyam Fashion Institute students during placements 2023 stood at INR 12.5 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA , respectively. The Institute recorded 98% placements in 2023. In addition, a total of 200 recruiters visited the campus during placements 2023.

The bed size is very small and space is also less otherwise it is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offered good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good for everything like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I am a day scholar so I don't know the hostel facilities but the facilities of canteen and sports are good. In the canteen, they serve fresh food and the sports classes are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and events planned by our college help us to portray ourselves.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and air-conditioning facilities in every classroom. I also like the food made in the canteen. We have a gym area where we can do workouts in our free period. There are different sports and sports events like scout camps and self-defense.

reviews.review_heading: College life here is different from my expectations.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include various laboratories for practicals like garment construction lab, pattern making lab, textiles lab, lifestyle and accessories lab, and CAD lab. Other facilities include air-conditioned classrooms, sports lawn, a newly opened gym and boutique are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, clean and full of plants. My favorite place is the sketching point where you can sit and do your work very peacefully and have fun. Laboratory, gym and boutique are available in our college, and you can get all the facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: My experience is good, and the facilities provided here played a good role in that.
reviews.review_text: Sports are really good here, as our college just opened a gym. Sports sir always encourages you for sports like TT, volleyball, cricket, basketball and indoor activities as well. Recently, we were provided self-defence classes as well.

reviews.review_heading: Except the timing issue, it's a good place to graduate from.
reviews.review_text: Good quality food is available in the canteen. Clean washrooms, lifts, air-conditioners, well-provided laboratories, sanitizers, libraries (online and on-campus), boutique, parlor, gymnasium, etc., are available for students.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Alagappa University ranks #76 under the category 'Overall'.

Alagappa University admissions 2025 are open. A few more updates are as forllows:

college_info.intro:
Alagappa University offers MBA and BSc as flagship courses. MBA is offered in specialisations such as Marketing, Finance, Production & Operations, Human Resources, Systems, Insurance, and Entrepreneurship. There is a reading room, library, modern classrooms, and other facilities available for students. Alagappa University faculty comprises of various individuals from several fields including Commerce, Agriculture, and Psychology. MBA students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant,TCS, Axis Bank.
Alagappa University - Karaikudi is ranked at 56 in NIRF 2023 under the Overall category, 30th in NIRF 2023 under the University (Overall) category, and 51st by QS World University Rankings 2023 under the Southern Asia category. Check below some of the courses offered by Alagappa University and their respective eligibility and Alagappa University fee structure:

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best university for M.A. in economics course.

review_content.Placements: The highest package was more than 6 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The accurate rate of placement over here was 73%. There were many people who went abroad for higher studies. Top recruiters were RBI, NITI Aayog, ICICI Bank, etc. Top jobs were economist and financial analyst. 70% of students got their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college offered 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. Labs were fully functional with all equipment. Our college had a central library on the 4th floor with more than 2,000 books. Hostel food had good value for money. The restaurant was open until midnight. Medical facilities were available 24X7, including an ambulance service. Our college had great sports facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, best university for MBA course.

review_content.Placements: About 96% of the students in my batch had been placed. Placements were still going on. The highest bid was INR 30 LPA, the lowest was INR 10 LPA, and the average bid was INR 20 LPA. Citibank, Hindustan Unilever, ITC, etc., were the top hiring companies last year. About 90% of students got internships. Top roles offered were CEO, CFO, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was solid. The wireless network was impressive. Nevertheless, Wi-Fi was accessible only for laptops. University bans the use of mobile phones for Wi-Fi. The infrastructure was solid. Additionally, the laboratories were available during extended hours for interested students. Classrooms and libraries were beneficial. The hostel accommodations were fairly simple, lacking in any luxuries.

They help us to gain challenging roles in various organisations and research centres. The least pay offered by the sector would be 2.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This is one of the top universities in Karaikudi which has highlighted features and performances that are quickly noticeable from their college website. Hostellers are levied with reasonable charges for accommodation as well as food expenses. Tuition fees vary from one person to another based on their previous records and their history.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in History - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best university for the M.A. in History course.

content.Placements: Approximately 96% of students have been placed in the past year. The top recruitment agencies are UNESCO, ICHR, ASI, etc. Almost 90% of students receive internships every year. The top jobs offered are museum curator, archivist, etc. Salaries range from 10 LPA to 16 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and equipment in our office were beautiful. There was always Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms were well-maintained. Besides the central library, there was a departmental library. At the hotel, the mess food was tolerable. The university hospital was good and close by. There was an ambulance that would come and pick you up if you got sick.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university for M.A. in economics course.

content.Placements: The highest package was more than 6 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The accurate rate of placement over here was 73%. There were many people who went abroad for higher studies. Top recruiters were RBI, NITI Aayog, ICICI Bank, etc. Top jobs were economist and financial analyst. 70% of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offered 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. Labs were fully functional with all equipment. Our college had a central library on the 4th floor with more than 2,000 books. Hostel food had good value for money. The restaurant was open until midnight. Medical facilities were available 24X7, including an ambulance service. Our college had great sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, best university for MBA course.

content.Placements: About 96% of the students in my batch had been placed. Placements were still going on. The highest bid was INR 30 LPA, the lowest was INR 10 LPA, and the average bid was INR 20 LPA. Citibank, Hindustan Unilever, ITC, etc., were the top hiring companies last year. About 90% of students got internships. Top roles offered were CEO, CFO, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was solid. The wireless network was impressive. Nevertheless, Wi-Fi was accessible only for laptops. University bans the use of mobile phones for Wi-Fi. The infrastructure was solid. Additionally, the laboratories were available during extended hours for interested students. Classrooms and libraries were beneficial. The hostel accommodations were fairly simple, lacking in any luxuries.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best College for an MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management course.

content.Placements: An MBA is acceptable, but placement opportunities for other branches are nonexistent. Not a single company from the civil branch comes to our college. MBA student's score was 93% in 2018. Maximum stipend for a student is 45k monthly, which I believe is quite favorable for a newcomer. Highest level positions include Financial Analyst, Financial Manager, and others.
content.Infrastructure: The college building has 8 floors, and it is the tallest building in Tamil Nadu. The college has a Wi-Fi facility in the computer lab, and the classrooms have blackboards with display devices. A library of non-new books. The college offers separate hostels for boys and girls.

admission_overview.college_name: Alagappa University Course Admissions 2025: Last Dates, Application, Eligibility, Selection Process

paragraphs: AU admisson is both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts an entrance exam for certain courses. AU offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD-level programmes in the fields of Arts, Science, Education, etc. Additionally, AU has a dedicated training and placement cell and an online portal that acts as a bridge between students and recruiters.

The university also offers courses in distance and online modes. Some online programmes such as MBA, MA, MCom, BBA, BA, and BCom are available. In distance mode, various UG, PG, Diploma, Diploma, and Certificate courses are offered. Minimum eligibility should be fulfilled in order to gain admission to distance and online courses.

The university has courses available at UG, PG and PhD levels. Candidates must ensure they are eligible for the pereferred course before applying for the same. A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is necessary for PG programmes. Below are popularAlagappa University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Bachelor's degree in relevant subjects
Bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)
Bachelor's degree in relevant subjects
Class 12 in relevant subjects
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
Bachelor's degree
Check out otherAlagappa University Courses
Algappa University fee includes different components, such as course fee, university share, learning centre share etc.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Find below the Algappa University courses fee and average package details:
Tuition Fee (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.
The table below provides the seat intake for various courses offered at Algappa University:
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

The university offers multiple courses in different modes, such as full-time, distance, and online programmes. The application and admission criteria differ from course to course as per the mode of the course. In case of any queries regarding the admission process, reach out to the admission office.
1 - Alagappa University Application Process

To apply for Alagappa University admission, candidates need to visit the official website and fill an online application form along with paying the application fee. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 600 for entrance courses and INR 400 for non-entrance programmes,
2 - Selection

The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to courses such as MBA, MCA, B.Ed, MSc. For merit-based course admissions, applicants' marks in the last qualifying examination are taken into consideration. For courses like MBA, selected students need to appear for group discussions and personal interview rounds.
3 - Result Declaration

Alagappa University announces the results to declare the names of selected students for admission. Candidates appearing for the university entrance test will be able to check their results on the website, however, they will be selected based on scores in the exam.
4 - Seat Allocation & Admission Fee Payment
After the result declaration, seats are allotted to the eligible students based on merit or entrance exam scores. During seat allotment, reservation policy also plays a crucial role.

tables.context: What is the highest package offered during Alagapp
Is there placement in Alagappa University?

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Alagappa University placements?
faqs.answer: The Alagappa University highest package has not been disclosed officially. However, the University has released the median package in the NIRF report 2024. As per the report, the highest median package offered during 2023 placements was INR 3.50 LPA and was made to PG (3-year) students. Check the table below to know the salary details for the past three years of Alagappa University placements: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) UG (3-year) INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.27 LPA PG (2-year) INR 1.80 LPA INR 2.46 LPA INR 2.40 LPA PG (3-year) N/A INR 2.70 LPA INR 3.50 LPA NOTE: The 2021 salary details for PG (3-year) courses are unavailable and, hence not showcased in the above table.

faqs.question: Is there placement in Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has a placement cell. During 2023 placements, 61 UG and 317 PG students were placed. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 1.27 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA, respectively. For PG (3-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 3.50 LPA. The important details related to Alagappa University placements 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (UG-3 year) 216 Students placed (UG-3 year) 61 Median package (UG-3 year) INR 1.27 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 1,226 Students placed (PG-2 year) 295 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 2.40 LPA Total students (PG-3 year) 63 Students placed (PG-3 year) 22 Median package (PG-3 year) INR 3.50 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are placements for MBA at Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Alagappa University has not released a concise placements report for MBA course. However, the university NIRF report 2024 is out. As per this report, out of 1,226 PG (two-year) candidates, 295 were placed. Moreover, the median package offered to the Alagappa University PG (two-year) candidates stood at INR 2.4 LPA in 2023.

faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing a BCom degree course?
faqs.answer: BCom course is the gateway to job opportunities in several fields such as Accounting, Finance, Economics, Taxation, Insurance, etc. One can become an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. after graduating with a BCom degree. This degree is also beneficial to those students who want to run their own businesses. Because of the variety of work prospects it gives, BCom is one of the most popular undergraduate educational programmes. Commerce is the nation's most important industry, and it has a huge impact on the economy. The expanding economy has resulted in a variety of job opportunities in the business sector. As a result, a Bachelor of Commerce degree can lead to a lucrative career.

According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #73 rank in the Overall category, #44 under University, and #14 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Alagappa University rankings.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Alagappa University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Alagappa University's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #73 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #44 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'State Public University' category have displayed an increasing trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #14 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

qs_world.description:
Alagappa University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Alagappa University fell 84 ranks to #369 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Alagappa University fell 26 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel.description: Alagappa University has 15 hostels with 427 rooms for men and women research scholars and graduate students of the University. Separate hostel for the overseas students. The hostel rooms are well furnished and well ventilated. There is provision to accommodate around 1,200 students. The hostels have separate hygienic mess halls, reading rooms supplemented with leading English and Tamil dailies, magazines and Employment News.

library.description: The Central Library of Alagappa University includes one lakh volumes of printed books, subscriptions to 149 printed periodicals, 492 items of non-book materials, and 1446 volumes of theses in print form. Access to 6242+ numbers of Online journals and 1,31,000+ numbers of e-theses are also available. The Library has all the amenities of a University Library – an inviting exterior, spacious Reading Halls, three-tier Stack Rooms, lucrative Conference Hall, elegant Discussion Room; Rooms for the Librarian, Library staff and different sections of the Library. Besides the Central Library, there are four aculty Libraries and Department Libraries to cater to the needs of the users in the respective locations. The Central Library is kept open on all the days of the year, except on Public Holidays (approximately 340 days in a year). The working hours are, on weekdays from 8-00A.M to 8.00 P.M., and during weekends from 10-00 A.M. to 5-00 P.M.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Throwball Court, Volleyball Court, Tennikoit Court, Kho-Kho Court, Kabaddi Court, Three Handball Field, Four Hockey Field, Athletics Track

reviews.review_heading: Recommended for students who are able to pay moderate fee.
reviews.review_text: This is one of the top universities in Karaikudi which has highlighted features and performances that are quickly noticeable from their college website. Hostellers are levied with reasonable charges for accommodation as well as food expenses. Tuition fees vary from one person to another based on their previous records and their history.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.A. in History course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and equipment in our office were beautiful. There was always Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms were well-maintained. Besides the central library, there was a departmental library. At the hotel, the mess food was tolerable. The university hospital was good and close by. There was an ambulance that would come and pick you up if you got sick.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for M.A. in economics course.
reviews.review_text: Our college offered 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. Labs were fully functional with all equipment. Our college had a central library on the 4th floor with more than 2,000 books. Hostel food had good value for money. The restaurant was open until midnight. Medical facilities were available 24X7, including an ambulance service. Our college had great sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best university for MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was solid. The wireless network was impressive. Nevertheless, Wi-Fi was accessible only for laptops. University bans the use of mobile phones for Wi-Fi. The infrastructure was solid. Additionally, the laboratories were available during extended hours for interested students. Classrooms and libraries were beneficial. The hostel accommodations were fairly simple, lacking in any luxuries.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best College for an MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management course.
reviews.review_text: The college building has 8 floors, and it is the tallest building in Tamil Nadu. The college has a Wi-Fi facility in the computer lab, and the classrooms have blackboards with display devices. A library of non-new books. The college offers separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Nachiappa Swamigal Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good for the fee charged, but placements are poor. The faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but the hostel is average. It's a small college, and the fee structure is affordable. We are more likely to join the college. It's totally disappointing. So I suggest students do not expect the college and college life. Students can go to the college directly, visit classrooms, and decide to join the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chennais Amirta International Institute of Hotel ManagementReviewed on 2 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities, and the infrastructure is good. They teach every single thing very well. Honestly, I don't know much about the hostel because I travel from home, but my friends who stay in the hostel say it has good quality. They get food three times a day, and sports and games are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by Thiagarajar School of ManagementReviewed on 26 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities available in the hostel were good, and the food served in the mess had good taste. Sports and games were also available. There was good infrastructure and a big ground. In our college, the hostel was very close to the college. Wi-Fi is there in every class. Our campus provides facilities like computer labs, Dell systems, iOS lab, library, canteen, playground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This is the greatest college overall.
reviews.review_text: The best materials were used for the classrooms, restrooms, library, canteen, hostel, and other facilities at this college, which had excellent infrastructure. Every facility was open. In addition to having clean food, the canteen has nice facilities. However, during the yearlong vacation, athletic events were only planned once a year.

reviews.review_heading: If you only want to study it's heaven.
reviews.review_text: The department of facilities was good because most of the necessary facilities were provided like water filters, air-conditioners, fans, Wi-Fi, etc. Hostel facilities were also same like AC, water, Wi-Fi, etc. Food quality was also good and hygiene was maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Caussanel College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and NEET halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor's visit with medicines. The mess has 100 fans. Sports are taught without any extra fees, and we study in the same college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best university for M.Sc. in chemistry course.
reviews.review_text: The apparatus is sufficient. Although several research laboratories require repair. The classrooms are in good shape, and the seats are well-furnished. While Wi-Fi is offered in hotels, it is not available in classrooms. The library is open from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM and from 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM, and it offers nearly all of the literature that students require. As a daily professor, I am unable to comment on hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.Sc. in Chemistry (Nanoscience & Technology) course.
reviews.review_text: Compared to other universities, the rooms were not that big. If you are planning to attend the university purely for infrastructure reasons, then this is not the right university. The law university is great, recently built, and has excellent central air conditioning. The campus is being renovated, it may take more than 2–3 years, but the courses are fully air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Overall all best college for MBA in logistics supply management course.
reviews.review_text: Our learning centers at this university are classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi. There are books in the library, and it produces the most wonderful atmosphere. I was provided food and milk every day, and my motel was open at night. Student clinics are available. Sports offered the best facilities on campus and are held every day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Syed Ammal College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 5 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Amazing to take part in this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. Hostel has the rooms with attached bathrooms and also common bathrooms. Every night our hostel has a doctor's meeting with a medicine. Mess is available with 100 fans. Sports are studied without fees and study in same college.

college_info.college_name: MIT School of Distance Education

highlights.summary: Admissions 2023-24 are open to all the courses and the last date to apply was Oct 4, 2023. Candidates can apply through the official website.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MIT School of Distance Education offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time and Part Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Design. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the MIT School of Distance Education offers MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM and PG Diploma. The fees for MIT School of Distance Education courses range between INR 25,000 to 95,000.

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Distance Education follows a fee refund policy in case of cancellation of admission. No fee is refunded in case admission is cancelled due to submission of false or misleading information, forged documents, concealment of facts, or any misrepresentation by the student. Below is the fee refund policy followed at MITSDE:Percentage of Refund of Aggregate FeesPoint of time when notice of withdrawal of admission is served to HEI100%Before the Reg ID is generated90%Within 7 days after Reg ID is generated80%More than 7 days but within 15 days after Reg ID is generated50%More than 15 days but within 30 days after Reg ID is generated0%More than 30 days after Reg ID is generated (Only processing fee of INR 2,000 is refundable)

faqs.answer: MIT School of Distance Education offers courses at PG, Diploma and certificate levels. The school offers two-year PGDM/ PG Diploma and 15-month Executive PGDM programmes. Besides, MITSDE also offers one-year certificate and six-months professional certificate courses in Management. Interested candidates can fill out the application form for preferred course online.

MITSDE considers graduation scores of the aspirants for PG, Diploma and certificate courses. The selection for professional certificate programmes is based on Class 10/ Class 12 scores of the candidates.

admission_process.title: MIT School of Distance Education Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MITSDE admission processis conducted online. The applications forms are available on the school's website for the aspirants. Those who fill out the form are shortlisted based on their merit. Below is step-wiseMIT School of Distance Education admission process:
Step 1: MITSDE Application Process 2025

Aspirants have to first fill out the application form for the preferred course. The school releases the forms online on the official website of MITSDE. Candidates can also download the form and email the scanned form along with documents on the official email id. Aspirants have to upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection

Aspirants meeting the eligibility requirements are shortlisted. The preliminary shortlisting is done based on verification of education documents and completeness of application form of the candidates.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Those who are selected recieve a confirmation email or SMS. Shortlisted candidates need to report at the campus for document verification. Further, aspirants also need to pay theMITSDE feeto confirm their seat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. (Hons.) in Animation and Digital Media - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not that good. They were giving unpaid internships to the past student. But now I guess it will improve as GD Goenka has tied up with UID.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a mac lab in our college. The block is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available with good speed. The classroom is spacious with a projector and speakers. The block has an auditorium also. Facilities are cool and the rules are strict in GD Goenka like fines.
review_content.Faculty: Semester exams are a little difficult as we have mostly practicals. Sometimes the external is not good so they ask a lot of questions. But facilities try their best to give good marks to students, and they're supportive. We have a mid-term examination also for practice. Faculty members are very supportive and helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. (Hons.) in Visual Communication - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest.

review_content.Placements: Placements in GD Goenka are fine, you can get good placements if you're pursuing design and for all the other course placements too. The CRC helps a lot so you can be guaranteed with a fine placement. One can expect good companies to come for placements they also facilitate students in their off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest, the campus be it the main campus or the hostel campus area are well built and taken care of. The lawns and fields are well maintained. The hostel is the best part of the campus and how the rooms are made for both boys and girls, well-equipped with all the modern facilities such as Wi-Fi and power backup 24*7.

review_summary.college_name: UID-NCR (GD Goenka University) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Fashion Design and Styling - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and management of this college.

content.Placements: UID gives decent placements and internship opportunities to its students. Approximately 30–35% of the students get placements at our college in the design course. The average package offered at the college for our course was between 4 - 9 LPA. The top recruiters at the college were various fashion and design companies.
content.Infrastructure: UID has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students. All kinds of modern facilities were available for the students interactive learning. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities were given to the students. Mess and canteen food were good to eat. All the facilities are properly managed by the college management.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Animation and Digital Media - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our batch was a really good batch. We went on trips. All the students were really friendly and supportive. We enjoyed our college life. The crowd is really good in the design course. Around 60 % of students got placements, but they were unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good in the design block and hostel. It is fully air-conditioned. Labs are there with all the design software. Classrooms have a projector, speakers board and screen. It is really fun studying at GD Goenka. Wi-Fi is available with good speed in the block and hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Fashion Design and Styling - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There are compulsory internships from the 2nd year. You have the internship in your last semester also. The students get placed with one of the companies they've interned with. You have the option of working in the field that you like whether that's an export house, a label/designer or a company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. You have the Wi-Fi facility that you can access with your username and password. You also have the Mac labs with all latest software. The food in the canteen had a lot of varieties. You get Indian and western food like pasta, pizza, bakes etc. The hostel rooms are good as the rooms have A/C, Wi-Fi facility, TV, and a fridge.

paragraphs: Theadmission process in UID-NCR (GD Goenka University)for the BDes and MDes courses is a four-step process. Students can check the detailed admission process below:
UID-NCR (GD Goenka University) Application Process

Unitedworld Institute of Design carries an application form in both online and offline modes. Candidates looking for admission to any course must fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria before applying for admission. After filling out the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to visit the official website of the college or visit the college campus in person to apply for admission.
Application Screening & Shortlisting
Unitedworld Institute of Design selects candidates based on entrance test marks. The college considers UID-DAT scores for admission to BDes and MDes programmes.
Portfolio Review & Personal Interaction
Those clearing the screening test are shortlisted for a portfolio review and personal interaction round. The evaluation process and their weightage is as below:
Weightage (Out of 100)
Design Aptitude Test (DAT)
Part A: Situation Test (ST)
Part B Portfolio Evaluation (PE)
Part A: Portfolio Evaluation (PE)
Part B Personal Interview (PI)

Admission AcceptanceOnce the personal interaction round with the portfolio review is over, through e-mail or any appropriate medium, the university will communicate the results to the shortlisted candidates. To confirm one's seat after being selected, they have to pay the first instalment of theUnitedworld Institute of Design feebased on the guidelines set by them.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool

labs.description: Available Facilities: Artificial Intelligence Arena (Multiple Labs), Virtual Production Lab, Sound Lab, Photography Lab, Digital Labs (Wacom / Mac), Mechatronics Lab, 3D Printing Lab, AR-VR Lab, Fabrication Lab, Sewing Lab, Pattern Making Studio, Print & Dying Lab, Automotive Clay Lab

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management of this college.
reviews.review_text: UID has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students. All kinds of modern facilities were available for the students interactive learning. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities were given to the students. Mess and canteen food were good to eat. All the facilities are properly managed by the college management.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good in the design block and hostel. It is fully air-conditioned. Labs are there with all the design software. Classrooms have a projector, speakers board and screen. It is really fun studying at GD Goenka. Wi-Fi is available with good speed in the block and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a mac lab in our college. The block is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available with good speed. The classroom is spacious with a projector and speakers. The block has an auditorium also. Facilities are cool and the rules are strict in GD Goenka like fines.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest, the campus be it the main campus or the hostel campus area are well built and taken care of. The lawns and fields are well maintained. The hostel is the best part of the campus and how the rooms are made for both boys and girls, well-equipped with all the modern facilities such as Wi-Fi and power backup 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. You have the Wi-Fi facility that you can access with your username and password. You also have the Mac labs with all latest software. The food in the canteen had a lot of varieties. You get Indian and western food like pasta, pizza, bakes etc. The hostel rooms are good as the rooms have A/C, Wi-Fi facility, TV, and a fridge.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is so average here and sometimes, it is horrible.
reviews.review_text: Labs are average, and sometimes we struggled to do our projects because of the non-availability of the gadgets. The infrastructure of the hostel is fine. The quality of the food is average. Medical Facilities are average. Sports and the games facilities are so poor.

reviews.review_heading: Gd Goenka is an amazing university for fashion designing and faculty is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: 1. The facility and infrastructure are really good with design lab, big classrooms, photoshoot room, material lab, stitching lab Dyeing lab. 2. The facility in hostel is also good as all the meal have a fix timetable.

faqs.answer: B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed their graduation from a recognised Institute/ University.B.Lib.I.Sc.Candidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognised board.PG DiplomaCandidates must have passed their graduation in any discipline from a recognised Institute/ University.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.B.ComCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.M.A.Candidates must have passed their graduation from a recognised Institute/ University.M.Sc.Candidates must have passed their graduation from a recognised Institute/ University.M.ComCandidates must have passed their graduation from a recognised Institute/ University.B.VocCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised board.B.A.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.B.M.M.Candidate passed 12th/equivalent of Maharashtra Board of Higher Secondary Education or its equivalent from the Science, Arts or Commerce Stream are eligible to apply.BBM/BMSCandidate passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra Board of Higher Secondary Education any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply. Candidate of reserved category passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra Board of Higher Secondary Education any recognised institute/board with 40% are eligible to apply. Candidate passed Diploma in any Engineering branches with two years or three years duration conducted by the Board of Technical Education, Maharashtra State or its equivalent examination are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in (MLT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.

content.Placements: In our course, around 70-80 percent of students are placed or receive internship opportunities. They are mostly selected based on their practical knowledge in this field. Our course is vocational, i.e., more practical-oriented than theory. Our college has tie-ups with reputed diagnostic centres and hospitals in Mumbai and Thane regions, like Metropolis Healthcare, SRL Diagnostics, Fortis Hospital, and some local pathology labs. Students who go for PG are eligible for their own collection centre license and can start their own business. Roles of this course are Medical Lab Technician and Phlebotomist.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Chemistry, Microbiology, Botany) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.

content.Placements: No placements as such, the batch went for the Master's. A great opportunity for research rather than jobs. M.Sc. students are getting placed rather than B.Sc students. 3 students got an internship in BARC. They were under different experiments and projects in the BARC for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

individual_reviews.title: B. K. Birla is such a good college.

content.Placements: More than 50 students get placed in this course. As per the placement data available, 465 out of 1925 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.16 LPA in 2024, and 245 out of 772 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.10 LPA in 2024. description: B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce cutoff 2025 is finally out for admission to undergraduate courses, for the third round. The cutoff was released in the form of percentages for different categories of students. The cutoff lists are published separately for all colleges affiliated with Mumbai University on their official website. Students whose names appear on the merit list must report to the college to confirm their seats. Aspirants seeking admission can refer to the sections below to view the course, specialisations, and category-wise cutoff details. Further information is provided below:

outlook.description:
B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #28, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Arts' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #32, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'Commerce' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #39, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab

reviews.review_heading: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.
reviews.review_text: In B.K. Birla College, they provide well-equipped laboratories with all the necessary instruments for biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology in clean and sterile conditions. We have a library with a good collection of books, approximately 10 lakh, as well as computer access for academic activities. We have sports facilities, including a badminton court, a large ground, an indoor area for indoor games, and a gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.
reviews.review_text: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best for simple graduation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. But some improvements can be made. Maths lab is in goob condition. Library is also good. Canteen is always full, and small in size but okay. Hostels are not available. There is a shortage of classes sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty members, strict about security, best event, fest, and library.
reviews.review_text: I am student of B.Sc. mathematics so in my department, sources like books from library, computer lab, headphones, and Wi-Fi connection are available in huge quantity in mathematics department. Fees are affordable but good part is that there is scholarship so you will get your fee back.

reviews.review_heading: B. K. Birla is such a good college.
reviews.review_text: B. K. Birla College in Kalyan offers a range of infrastructure facilities for courses but does not provide on-campus hostel accommodation. Students who need hostel facilities seek private accommodation near the campus. They provide fast Wi-Fi, and labs are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: If you are searching for a fantastic college, then you have come to the right place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It is known as Birla College, where you can do junior college courses and other technical courses for graduation. There is also a sports ground where you can go and play any game you want.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, helpful faculty, decent placements, and a campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department is well-equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has air-conditioned modern classrooms with smart boards and projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. The canteen provides nutritious food. Medical and sports management and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The greatest college for students to upgrade their skills.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay but neat and clean. Washrooms are also clean, but the canteens are crowded all the time. They provide the best facilities to hang out with friends and learn new skills,  like the gym, gaming space, and sports ground. Teachers and staff are so friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, the placement is average, but the campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: AC classrooms with big benches and a clean environment, big windows for proper ventilation, and a gym with proper equipment. There is a tennis court, indoor and outdoor laboratories of Botany, Zoology, Chemistry, and a library. Laptop lab, seminar halls for masterclasses and workshops.

reviews.review_heading: The Best batch of 2024 was given to us.
reviews.review_text: See, the college doesn’t have any hostel, but the process of building one is ongoing. The classrooms of the college are very good. Even this year, the rooms were made better. They provide us with projectors, Wi-Fi, and the campus is very good. The library has a separate building.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, campus, food, and good professors.
reviews.review_text:
We have classrooms, well developed labs, Wi-Fi, pc, library, reading room, etc. Quality of food is 10/10
Gaming room is good, We also have gcr for girls 
Library has section for girls and boys
Washrooms has privacy for girls and for emergency everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, supportive professors, average infrastructure, great security.
reviews.review_text: We do have a Gymkhana, the library is good, a huge ground, canteen, Chemistry and Physics labs, medical unit, and a big infrastructure for that matter with the best security—100/10 for security in our college. It's big, has an NCC unit, and many more such groups such as Rotaract clubs. It helps a lot in self-development.

reviews.review_heading: We had a really good infrastructure, nice college life, very helpful teachers, and coordinators.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided were very good. The college has a good ambiance to study. The canteen has fresh food. There is an opportunity for good sports persons, and you get good opportunities. There is a nice big library and separate rooms for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but average college life with a lot of fests every now and then.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall college is good. Plenty of space to roam and greenery. Availability of gym (although rundown) and a fair ground. Labs are well maintained and the buildings and washrooms are cleaned from time to time. Washrooms for disabled are available on each floor but there is no ramp available for them.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and good faculty, but limited placement opportunities in IT.
reviews.review_text: We have separate IT labs for the IT department with fast and wide Ethernet connections. It does not have hostel facilities, but the food quality of the mess and canteen is very good as they take proper measures for social hygiene. They also have medical facilities for emergency situations with proper medical staff. They also have proper equipment for sports and games as they provide sports events and competitions to encourage student participation.
